---
title: "Layer 5/6"
output: html_document
date: "2025-11-03"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.width = 8,
  fig.height = 6
)
```

```{r load-packages}
library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(cowplot)
library(ggplot2)
library(arrow)
library(XeniumSpatialAnalysis)
library(harmony)
library(edgeR)
library(remotes)
library(patchwork)
library(clustree)
library(Matrix)
library(hdf5r)
library(circlize)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(DESeq2)
```

```{r set-paths}
setwd("~/labs/lamantia/Shah/Xenium Files")
home <- "~/labs/lamantia/Shah/Xenium Files/LD-WT-P5_NAC 9.10.25"
save.location <- "~/labs/lamantia/Shah/Xenium Files/saveRDS"
#all_samples <- readRDS(file.path(save.location, "no_22q_all_samples_with_clean_replicate_metadata_SCT_Harmony_after_findcluster_res0.1.rds"))
```

```{r}


# First, define which cells are in cluster 0
cluster_0_cells <- Cells(all_samples)[all_samples$seurat_clusters == 0]

# Define common l23 markers (adjust based on your species if needed)
l23_markers <- c("Pou3f2", "Cux2")


# Now check the expression of l23 markers in cluster 0
cluster_0_expression <- FetchData(all_samples, 
                                 vars = l23_markers,
                                 cells = cluster_0_cells)

print("l23 marker expression in cluster 0:")
print(summary(cluster_0_expression))

# Check what percentage of cluster 0 cells express l23 markers above threshold
threshold <- 1  # Adjust this threshold based on your data
for (marker in l23_markers) {
  pct_expressing <- mean(cluster_0_expression[, marker] > threshold) * 100
  print(paste("Percentage of cluster 0 cells expressing", marker, "above", threshold, ":", 
              round(pct_expressing, 2), "%"))
}

# Visualize the expression of these markers in cluster 0 vs other cells
FeaturePlot(all_samples, 
            features = l23_markers, 
            cells = cluster_0_cells,
            pt.size = 0.5,
            max.cutoff = 'q95') +
  ggtitle("l23_markers Marker Expression in Cluster 0 Cells")

# Also check in the context of all cells
FeaturePlot(all_samples, 
            features = l23_markers,
            pt.size = 0.5,
            max.cutoff = 'q95') +
  ggtitle("l23_markers Marker Expression - All Cells")

# Let's also check which clusters actually express l23_markers
print("Checking l23_markers expression across all clusters:")
for (marker in l23_markers) {
  avg_expression <- AverageExpression(all_samples, 
                                     features = marker, 
                                     group.by = "seurat_clusters")[[1]]
  print(paste("Average", marker, "expression by cluster:"))
  print(avg_expression)
}

# Option: Create a more stringent cluster 0 definition
# Remove cells from cluster 0 that express high levels of l23 markers

# Calculate a composite l23 score
l23_scores <- rowSums(cluster_0_expression)
high_l23_cells <- names(l23_scores)[l23_scores > quantile(l23_scores, 0.9)]

# Create a cleaned cluster 0 definition
all_samples$is_cluster_0_clean <- ifelse(
  all_samples$seurat_clusters == 0 & !(Cells(all_samples) %in% high_l23_cells),
  "Cluster_0_clean",
  "Other"
)

print(paste("Number of cells removed from cluster 0:", length(high_l23_cells)))
print(paste("Remaining cluster 0 cells:", sum(all_samples$is_cluster_0_clean == "Cluster_0_clean")))

# Plot the cleaned version
p_umap_clean <- DimPlot(all_samples, 
                        group.by = "is_cluster_0_clean", 
                        cols = c("Cluster_0_clean" = "#E41A1C", "Other" = "gray90"), 
                        pt.size = 0.5) +
  ggtitle("Cluster 0 (Cleaned) - Removed High l23 marker Expressing Cells")
print(p_umap_clean)
ggsave("cluster_0_cleaned_umap.pdf", p_umap_clean, width = 10, height = 8)


# Define neuronal markers to check
neuronal_markers <- c("Gad1", "Gad2", "Cux1")

# Check expression in the cleaned cluster 0
cluster_0_clean_cells <- Cells(all_samples)[all_samples$is_cluster_0_clean == "Cluster_0_clean"]

# Get expression data for neuronal markers in cleaned cluster 0
cluster_0_clean_expression <- FetchData(all_samples, 
                                       vars = neuronal_markers,
                                       cells = cluster_0_clean_cells)

print("Neuronal marker expression in cleaned Cluster 0:")
print(apply(cluster_0_clean_expression, 2, summary))

# Check what percentage of cleaned cluster 0 cells express these markers above threshold
threshold <- 1  # Use the same threshold as before
for (marker in neuronal_markers) {
  pct_expressing <- mean(cluster_0_clean_expression[, marker] > threshold) * 100
  print(paste("Percentage of cleaned Cluster 0 cells expressing", marker, "above", threshold, ":", 
              round(pct_expressing, 2), "%"))
}

# Visualize the expression in cleaned cluster 0 cells
FeaturePlot(all_samples, 
            features = neuronal_markers, 
            cells = cluster_0_clean_cells,
            pt.size = 0.5,
            order = TRUE,  # Plot positive cells on top
            max.cutoff = 'q95') +
  ggtitle("Neuronal Marker Expression in Cleaned Cluster 0 Cells")

# Also check in the context of all cells for comparison
FeaturePlot(all_samples, 
            features = neuronal_markers,
            pt.size = 0.5,
            order = TRUE,
            max.cutoff = 'q95') +
  ggtitle("Neuronal Marker Expression - All Cells")

# Check expression across all clusters for these neuronal markers
print("Checking neuronal marker expression across all clusters:")
for (marker in neuronal_markers) {
  avg_expression <- AverageExpression(all_samples, 
                                     features = marker, 
                                     group.by = "seurat_clusters")[[1]]
  print(paste("Average", marker, "expression by cluster:"))
  print(avg_expression)
}

# Create a violin plot to compare expression across clusters
VlnPlot(all_samples,
        features = neuronal_markers,
        group.by = "seurat_clusters",
        pt.size = 0,
        ncol = 1) +
  ggtitle("Neuronal Marker Expression by Cluster")

# Compare expression before and after cleaning
print("=== COMPARISON: Original vs Cleaned Cluster 0 ===")

# Get expression in original cluster 0
cluster_0_original_expression <- FetchData(all_samples, 
                                          vars = neuronal_markers,
                                          cells = cluster_0_cells)

for (marker in neuronal_markers) {
  original_mean <- mean(cluster_0_original_expression[, marker])
  cleaned_mean <- mean(cluster_0_clean_expression[, marker])
  original_pct <- mean(cluster_0_original_expression[, marker] > threshold) * 100
  cleaned_pct <- mean(cluster_0_clean_expression[, marker] > threshold) * 100
  
  print(paste(marker, ":"))
  print(paste("  Original - Mean:", round(original_mean, 3), "Pct > threshold:", round(original_pct, 1), "%"))
  print(paste("  Cleaned  - Mean:", round(cleaned_mean, 3), "Pct > threshold:", round(cleaned_pct, 1), "%"))
  print(paste("  Change    - Mean:", round(cleaned_mean - original_mean, 3), "Pct:", round(cleaned_pct - original_pct, 1), "%"))
}
  

```

```{r # 2. Create Cluster 0 subset object from the cleaned version}

cluster_0_clean_cells <- Cells(all_samples)[all_samples$is_cluster_0_clean == "Cluster_0_clean"]
cluster_0_clean <- subset(all_samples, cells = cluster_0_clean_cells)

# Check the subset
print(paste("Number of cells in cleaned Cluster 0:", ncol(cluster_0_clean)))
print("Genotype distribution in cleaned Cluster 0:")
print(table(cluster_0_clean$genotype))
print("Animal ID distribution in cleaned Cluster 0:")
print(table(cluster_0_clean$animal_id))


```

```{r}
plan("multisession", workers = 12)
options(future.globals.maxSize = 150 * 1024^3)

DefaultAssay(cluster_0_clean) <- "Xenium"

# SCTransform normalization
cluster_0_clean <- SCTransform(
  cluster_0_clean,
  assay = "Xenium",
  method = "glmGamPoi",
  vars.to.regress = "nCount_Xenium",
  verbose = TRUE
)

# Remove 22q11 genes from HVGs
x22q11_genes <- c(
  "Ranbp1", "Dgcr8", "Cdc45", "Trmt2a", "Comt",
  "Tango2", "Mrpl40", "Slc25a1", "Zdhhc8",
  "Txnrd2", "Hira", "Prodh"
)

available_22q11 <- intersect(x22q11_genes, VariableFeatures(cluster_0_clean))
VariableFeatures(cluster_0_clean) <- setdiff(VariableFeatures(cluster_0_clean), available_22q11)

cat("Removed", length(available_22q11), "22q11 genes from HVGs for clustering\n")

# Dimensional reduction & integration
cluster_0_clean <- RunPCA(cluster_0_clean, npcs = 50, verbose = FALSE)
ElbowPlot(cluster_0_clean, ndims = 50)

# Calculate suggested PCs
pca_var <- cluster_0_clean[["pca"]]@stdev^2
pca_var_perc <- pca_var / sum(pca_var) * 100
suggested_pcs <- which(cumsum(pca_var_perc) >= 80)[1]
cat("Suggested PCs for Cluster 0:", suggested_pcs, "\n")

# Run Harmony integration
cluster_0_clean <- RunHarmony(
  object = cluster_0_clean,
  group.by.vars = "animal_id",
  dims.use = 1:26,
  verbose = TRUE
)

# UMAP and clustering
cluster_0_clean <- RunUMAP(cluster_0_clean, reduction = "harmony", dims = 1:26)
cluster_0_clean <- FindNeighbors(cluster_0_clean, reduction = "harmony", dims = 1:26)
cluster_0_clean <- FindClusters(cluster_0_clean, resolution = 0.1)

# Save for downstream use
cluster_0_clean$genotype  <- factor(cluster_0_clean$genotype)
cluster_0_clean$animal_id <- factor(cluster_0_clean$animal_id)
saveRDS(cluster_0_clean, file.path(save.location, "Cluster0_subset_no22q11_SCT_Harmony_res0.1_processed.rds"))
cluster_0_clean <- readRDS(file.path(save.location, "Cluster0_subset_no22q11_SCT_Harmony_res0.1_processed.rds"))
# Quick check: ensure exclusion worked
any(x22q11_genes %in% rownames(Loadings(cluster_0_clean[["pca"]])))

```


```{r}

# Load the processed Cluster 0 data if needed
# cluster_0_clean <- readRDS(file.path(save.location, "Cluster0_subset_no22q11_SCT_Harmony_res0.1_processed.rds"))

# Spatial plot showing only Cluster 0 cells
sp_cluster0 <- ImageDimPlot(
  cluster_0_clean,
  group.by = "seurat_clusters",
  axes = FALSE,
  size = 0.8
) + ggtitle("Cluster 0 - Spatial Distribution")

ggsave("Cluster0_subset_no22q11_spatial_clusters.pdf", sp_cluster0, width = 10, height = 8)

# Quick QC check
cat("Original cells:", ncol(all_samples), "\n")
cat("Cluster 0 subset:", ncol(cluster_0_clean), "\n") 
cat("Percentage of total:", round(ncol(cluster_0_clean)/ncol(all_samples)*100, 1), "%\n")

# Verify neuronal markers
FeaturePlot(cluster_0_clean, features = c("Cux2", "Gad1"), order = TRUE)

# Reorder genotype factor levels
cluster_0_clean$genotype <- factor(cluster_0_clean$genotype, levels = c("WT", "LD", "LD_NAC", "WT_NAC"))

# Generate violin plot with neuronal markers
vln_plot_cluster0 <- VlnPlot(cluster_0_clean, 
                    features = c("Cux1", "Cux2", "Pou3f2", "Rasgrf2", "Bcl11b", "Fezf2", "Foxp2", "Gad1", "Gad2", "Gfap", "Pecam1", "Ppp1r1b"), 
                    group.by = "genotype", 
                    pt.size = 0,
                       cols = c("WT" = "#A6CEE3",        # Pastel blue
                            "LD" = "#FB9A99",         # Pastel red
                            "LD_NAC" = "#FDBF6F",     # Pastel orange
                            "WT_NAC" = "#FFFF99")) +  # Pastel yellow
  theme(legend.position = "right")
ggsave("Cluster0_subset_no22q11_violin_plot_markers.pdf", vln_plot_cluster0, width = 16, height = 12, dpi = 300)

# Define your custom color palette for genotypes
genotype_colors <- c("WT" = "#A6CEE3",        # Pastel blue
                    "LD" = "#FB9A99",         # Pastel red
                    "LD_NAC" = "#FDBF6F",     # Pastel orange
                    "WT_NAC" = "#FFFF99")     # Pastel yellow

# UMAP plots
p1_cluster0 <- DimPlot(cluster_0_clean, group.by = "animal_id", shuffle = TRUE) + ggtitle("Cluster 0 - By Animal ID")
p2_cluster0 <- DimPlot(cluster_0_clean, 
                      group.by = "genotype",
                      cols = genotype_colors,
                      pt.size = 0.5) +
  ggtitle("Cluster 0 - By Genotype")
p3_cluster0 <- DimPlot(cluster_0_clean, group.by = "seurat_clusters") + ggtitle("Cluster 0 - Clusters")
p1_cluster0 + p2_cluster0 + p3_cluster0

ggsave("Cluster0_subset_no22q11_umap_animal_id.pdf", p1_cluster0, width = 10, height = 8)
ggsave("Cluster0_subset_no22q11_umap_genotype.pdf", p2_cluster0, width = 10, height = 8)
ggsave("Cluster0_subset_no22q11_umap_clusters.pdf", p3_cluster0, width = 10, height = 8)

# Spatial plots
sp1_cluster0 <- ImageDimPlot(cluster_0_clean, group.by = "seurat_clusters", axes = FALSE) + 
  ggtitle("Cluster 0 - Spatial Clusters")
sp2_cluster0 <- ImageDimPlot(cluster_0_clean, group.by = "genotype", axes = FALSE) + 
  ggtitle("Cluster 0 - Spatial Genotype")
sp3_cluster0 <- ImageDimPlot(cluster_0_clean, group.by = "animal_id", axes = FALSE) + 
  ggtitle("Cluster 0 - Spatial Animal ID")

ggsave("Cluster0_subset_no22q11_spatial_animal_id.pdf", sp3_cluster0, width = 10, height = 8)
ggsave("Cluster0_subset_no22q11_spatial_genotype.pdf", sp2_cluster0, width = 10, height = 8)
ggsave("Cluster0_subset_no22q11_spatial_clusters.pdf", sp1_cluster0, width = 10, height = 8)

# Create UMAP plot showing Cluster 0 cells in the context of all samples
p_cluster0_in_context <- DimPlot(all_samples,
                                group.by = "cluster_0_status",
                                cols = c("Cluster_0" = "#E41A1C", "Other" = "gray90"),
                                pt.size = 0.3,
                                order = c("Cluster_0")) +  # Plot Cluster_0 on top
  ggtitle("Cluster 0 Cells in Full Dataset") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"))

print(p_cluster0_in_context)
ggsave("Cluster0_subset_in_all_samples_umap.pdf", p_cluster0_in_context, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

# Print summary statistics
print("=== CLUSTER 0 SUBSET SUMMARY ===")
print(paste("Total cells in dataset:", ncol(all_samples)))
print(paste("Cluster 0 cells:", sum(all_samples$seurat_clusters == 0)))
print(paste("Percentage of total:", round(sum(all_samples$seurat_clusters == 0) / ncol(all_samples) * 100, 1), "%"))

```


```{r}
# Create enhanced PCA plot for Cluster 0
library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot)

# Get variance explained for Cluster 0 PCA
variance_explained_cluster0 <- cluster_0_clean[["pca"]]@stdev^2 / sum(cluster_0_clean[["pca"]]@stdev^2) * 100

# Create clean PCA plot for Cluster 0
p_pca_cluster0 <- DimPlot(cluster_0_clean,
                         reduction = "pca",
                         group.by = "seurat_clusters",
                         pt.size = 1.5) +
  xlab(paste0("PC1 (", round(variance_explained_cluster0[1], 1), "% variance)")) +
  ylab(paste0("PC2 (", round(variance_explained_cluster0[2], 1), "% variance)")) +
  ggtitle("Cluster 0 - PCA") +
  theme_cowplot() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 14),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12))

print(p_pca_cluster0)
ggsave("Cluster0_subset_PCA.pdf", p_pca_cluster0, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# Get PCA loadings for Cluster 0
pca_loadings_cluster0 <- Loadings(cluster_0_clean, reduction = "pca")[, 1:2]
top_pc1_cluster0 <- head(pca_loadings_cluster0[order(abs(pca_loadings_cluster0[,1]), decreasing = TRUE), 1], 20)
top_pc2_cluster0 <- head(pca_loadings_cluster0[order(abs(pca_loadings_cluster0[,2]), decreasing = TRUE), 2], 20)

print("Top genes in PC1 for Cluster 0:")
print(top_pc1_cluster0)

print("Top genes in PC2 for Cluster 0:")
print(top_pc2_cluster0)

# Create PCA loadings visualization for Cluster 0
pc1_genes_cluster0 <- data.frame(
  gene = names(top_pc1_cluster0)[1:10],
  loading = top_pc1_cluster0[1:10],
  pc = "PC1"
)

pc2_genes_cluster0 <- data.frame(
  gene = names(top_pc2_cluster0)[1:10],
  loading = top_pc2_cluster0[1:10],
  pc = "PC2"
)

p_loadings_cluster0 <- ggplot(rbind(pc1_genes_cluster0, pc2_genes_cluster0), 
                             aes(x = reorder(gene, abs(loading)), y = abs(loading), fill = loading > 0)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~pc, scales = "free_y") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = "Gene", y = "Absolute Loading Value",
       title = "Cluster 0 - Key Genes Driving Principal Components",
       subtitle = paste("PC1:", round(variance_explained_cluster0[1], 1), "% variance | PC2:", round(variance_explained_cluster0[2], 1), "% variance")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "blue", "TRUE" = "red"),
                    name = "Direction",
                    labels = c("Negative", "Positive")) +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave("Cluster0_subset_PCA_loadings_analysis.pdf", p_loadings_cluster0, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)

```


```{r}

plan("multisession", workers = 12)
options(future.globals.maxSize = 150 * 1024^3)

DefaultAssay(cluster_0_clean) <- "Xenium"
cluster_0_clean <- JoinLayers(cluster_0_clean)
cluster_0_clean <- NormalizeData(cluster_0_clean, normalization.method = "LogNormalize")
cluster_0_clean <- ScaleData(cluster_0_clean)

# Find markers with slightly relaxed parameters
AllMarkers_cluster0 <- FindAllMarkers(
    cluster_0_clean,
    assay = "Xenium",
    only.pos = TRUE,
    min.pct = 0.25,
    logfc.threshold = 0.25,
    test.use = "wilcox"
)

# save for reference
write.csv(AllMarkers_cluster0, file.path(save.location, "Cluster0_subset_no22q11_Xenium_FindAllMarkers.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```


```{r}
# Set identities to genotype for DE analysis
Idents(cluster_0_clean) <- "genotype"

# Include animal_id as latent variable to control for batch effects
de_wt_vs_ld_cluster0 <- FindMarkers(
  cluster_0_clean,
  ident.1 = "LD",
  ident.2 = "WT",
  latent.vars = "animal_id",
  min.pct = 0.1,
  logfc.threshold = 0.1
)

de_wt_vs_ldnac_cluster0 <- FindMarkers(
  cluster_0_clean,
  ident.1 = "LD_NAC",
  ident.2 = "WT",
  latent.vars = "animal_id",
  min.pct = 0.1,
  logfc.threshold = 0.1
)

de_ld_vs_ldnac_cluster0 <- FindMarkers(
  cluster_0_clean,
  ident.1 = "LD_NAC",
  ident.2 = "LD",
  latent.vars = "animal_id",
  min.pct = 0.1,
  logfc.threshold = 0.1
)

de_wt_vs_wtnac_cluster0 <- FindMarkers(
  cluster_0_clean,
  ident.1 = "WT_NAC",
  ident.2 = "WT",
  latent.vars = "animal_id",
  min.pct = 0.1,
  logfc.threshold = 0.1
)

de_wtnac_vs_ldnac_cluster0 <- FindMarkers(
  cluster_0_clean,
  ident.1 = "LD_NAC",
  ident.2 = "WT_NAC",
  latent.vars = "animal_id",
  min.pct = 0.1,
  logfc.threshold = 0.1
)

# Save all DE results
write.csv(de_wt_vs_ld_cluster0, "Cluster0_subset_WT_vs_LD_DE_Findmarkers.csv")
write.csv(de_wt_vs_ldnac_cluster0, "Cluster0_subset_WT_vs_LDNAC_DE_Findmarkers.csv")
write.csv(de_ld_vs_ldnac_cluster0, "Cluster0_subset_LD_vs_LDNAC_DE_Findmarkers.csv")
write.csv(de_wt_vs_wtnac_cluster0, "Cluster0_subset_WT_vs_WTNAC_DE_Findmarkers.csv")
write.csv(de_wtnac_vs_ldnac_cluster0, "Cluster0_subset_WTNAC_vs_LDNAC_DE_Findmarkers.csv")

```

```{r}

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(ggrepel)

# Define the create_volcano function for Cluster 0
create_volcano <- function(de_results, title, p_cutoff = 0.05, fc_cutoff = 0.25) {
  # Prepare data
  volcano_data <- de_results %>%
    mutate(
      gene = rownames(.),
      log10_pval = -log10(p_val_adj),
      significance = case_when(
        p_val_adj < p_cutoff & avg_log2FC > fc_cutoff ~ "Up",
        p_val_adj < p_cutoff & avg_log2FC < -fc_cutoff ~ "Down", 
        TRUE ~ "Not significant"
      )
    )
  
  # Get top genes for labeling
  top_genes <- volcano_data %>%
    filter(significance != "Not significant") %>%
    arrange(p_val_adj) %>%
    head(10)
  
  # Create plot
  p <- ggplot(volcano_data, aes(x = avg_log2FC, y = log10_pval, color = significance)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 1.5) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(p_cutoff), linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-fc_cutoff, fc_cutoff), linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
    geom_text_repel(
      data = top_genes,
      aes(label = gene),
      size = 3,
      max.overlaps = 20,
      box.padding = 0.5,
      segment.color = "gray50"
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "Up" = "#E31A1C",
        "Down" = "#1F78B4", 
        "Not significant" = "gray70"
      )
    ) +
    labs(
      title = title,
      x = "Log2 Fold Change",
      y = "-Log10 Adjusted P-value"
    ) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 12),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 10),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_blank()
    )
  
  return(p)
}

# Create and save each volcano plot for Cluster 0
p1_cluster0 <- create_volcano(de_wt_vs_ld_cluster0, "LD vs WT in Cluster 0")
p2_cluster0 <- create_volcano(de_wt_vs_ldnac_cluster0, "LD_NAC vs WT in Cluster 0")
p3_cluster0 <- create_volcano(de_ld_vs_ldnac_cluster0, "LD_NAC vs LD in Cluster 0")
p4_cluster0 <- create_volcano(de_wt_vs_wtnac_cluster0, "WT_NAC vs WT in Cluster 0")
p5_cluster0 <- create_volcano(de_wtnac_vs_ldnac_cluster0, "LD_NAC vs WT_NAC in Cluster 0")

# Save individual plots
ggsave("Cluster0_subset_volcano_LD_vs_WT_FindMarkers.pdf", p1_cluster0, width = 8, height = 10, dpi = 300)
ggsave("Cluster0_subset_volcano_LDNAC_vs_WT_FindMarkers.pdf", p2_cluster0, width = 8, height = 10, dpi = 300)
ggsave("Cluster0_subset_volcano_LDNAC_vs_LD_FindMarkers.pdf", p3_cluster0, width = 8, height = 10, dpi = 300)
ggsave("Cluster0_subset_volcano_WTNAC_vs_WT_FindMarkers.pdf", p4_cluster0, width = 8, height = 10, dpi = 300)
ggsave("Cluster0_subset_volcano_LDNAC_vs_WTNAC_FindMarkers.pdf", p5_cluster0, width = 8, height = 10, dpi = 300)

# Print confirmation
print("Cluster 0 volcano plots created and saved successfully!")

```


```{r}
pb_cluster0 <- AggregateExpression(
  cluster_0_clean,
  assays = "Xenium",
  group.by = c("genotype", "animal_id"),
  slot = "counts"
)
counts_cluster0 <- pb_cluster0$Xenium

meta_cluster0 <- data.frame(
  genotype  = sub("_.*", "", colnames(counts_cluster0)),
  animal_id = sub("^[^_]*_", "", colnames(counts_cluster0))
)
meta_cluster0$genotype  <- gsub("-", "_", meta_cluster0$genotype)
meta_cluster0$animal_id <- gsub("-", "_", meta_cluster0$animal_id)

meta_cluster0$genotype <- factor(meta_cluster0$genotype, levels = c("WT", "LD", "LD_NAC", "WT_NAC"))

dds_cluster0 <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = round(counts_cluster0),
  colData = meta_cluster0,
  design = ~ genotype
)

dds_cluster0 <- DESeq(dds_cluster0)

resultsNames(dds_cluster0)

res_LD_vs_WT_cluster0      <- results(dds_cluster0, name = "genotype_LD_vs_WT")
res_LD_NAC_vs_WT_cluster0  <- results(dds_cluster0, name = "genotype_LD_NAC_vs_WT")
res_WT_NAC_vs_WT_cluster0  <- results(dds_cluster0, name = "genotype_WT_NAC_vs_WT")

# for non-reference contrasts
res_LD_NAC_vs_LD_cluster0  <- results(dds_cluster0, contrast = c("genotype", "LD_NAC", "LD"))
res_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0 <- results(dds_cluster0, contrast = c("genotype", "WT_NAC", "LD_NAC"))

write.csv(as.data.frame(res_LD_vs_WT_cluster0),      file.path(save.location, "Cluster0_subset_DESeq2_LD_vs_WT.csv"))
write.csv(as.data.frame(res_LD_NAC_vs_WT_cluster0),  file.path(save.location, "Cluster0_subset_DESeq2_LD_NAC_vs_WT.csv"))
write.csv(as.data.frame(res_WT_NAC_vs_WT_cluster0),  file.path(save.location, "Cluster0_subset_DESeq2_WT_NAC_vs_WT.csv"))
write.csv(as.data.frame(res_LD_NAC_vs_LD_cluster0),  file.path(save.location, "Cluster0_subset_DESeq2_LD_NAC_vs_LD.csv"))
write.csv(as.data.frame(res_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0), file.path(save.location, "Cluster0_subset_DESeq2_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC.csv"))

```

```{r}

pb_cluster0 <- AggregateExpression(
  cluster_0_clean,
  assays = "Xenium",
  group.by = c("genotype", "animal_id"),
  slot = "counts"
)
counts_cluster0 <- pb_cluster0$Xenium

meta_cluster0 <- data.frame(
  genotype  = sub("_.*", "", colnames(counts_cluster0)),
  animal_id = sub("^[^_]*_", "", colnames(counts_cluster0))
)
meta_cluster0$genotype  <- gsub("-", "_", meta_cluster0$genotype)
meta_cluster0$animal_id <- gsub("-", "_", meta_cluster0$animal_id)

meta_cluster0$genotype <- factor(meta_cluster0$genotype, levels = c("WT", "LD", "LD_NAC", "WT_NAC"))

dds_cluster0 <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = round(counts_cluster0),
  colData = meta_cluster0,
  design = ~ genotype
)

dds_cluster0 <- DESeq(dds_cluster0)

resultsNames(dds_cluster0)

res_LD_vs_WT_cluster0      <- results(dds_cluster0, name = "genotype_LD_vs_WT")
res_LD_NAC_vs_WT_cluster0  <- results(dds_cluster0, name = "genotype_LD_NAC_vs_WT")
res_WT_NAC_vs_WT_cluster0  <- results(dds_cluster0, name = "genotype_WT_NAC_vs_WT")

# for non-reference contrasts
res_LD_NAC_vs_LD_cluster0  <- results(dds_cluster0, contrast = c("genotype", "LD_NAC", "LD"))
res_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0 <- results(dds_cluster0, contrast = c("genotype", "WT_NAC", "LD_NAC"))

write.csv(as.data.frame(res_LD_vs_WT_cluster0),      file.path(save.location, "Cluster0_subset_DESeq2_LD_vs_WT.csv"))
write.csv(as.data.frame(res_LD_NAC_vs_WT_cluster0),  file.path(save.location, "Cluster0_subset_DESeq2_LD_NAC_vs_WT.csv"))
write.csv(as.data.frame(res_WT_NAC_vs_WT_cluster0),  file.path(save.location, "Cluster0_subset_DESeq2_WT_NAC_vs_WT.csv"))
write.csv(as.data.frame(res_LD_NAC_vs_LD_cluster0),  file.path(save.location, "Cluster0_subset_DESeq2_LD_NAC_vs_LD.csv"))
write.csv(as.data.frame(res_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0), file.path(save.location, "Cluster0_subset_DESeq2_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC.csv"))
```

```{r # 12. DE Analysis with Count Aggregate in EdgeR for Cluster 0}
DefaultAssay(cluster_0_clean) <- "Xenium"
cluster_0_clean <- JoinLayers(cluster_0_clean)

cell_meta_cluster0 <- cluster_0_clean@meta.data[, c("genotype","animal_id")]
cell_meta_cluster0$cell <- rownames(cell_meta_cluster0)

X_cluster0 <- GetAssayData(cluster_0_clean, slot = "counts")
rep_keys_cluster0 <- paste(cell_meta_cluster0$genotype, cell_meta_cluster0$animal_id, sep = "__")

pb_mat_cluster0_edgeR <- rowsum(t(as.matrix(X_cluster0)), group = rep_keys_cluster0)
pb_mat_cluster0_edgeR <- t(pb_mat_cluster0_edgeR)

parts_cluster0 <- do.call(rbind, strsplit(colnames(pb_mat_cluster0_edgeR), "__"))
coldata_cluster0 <- data.frame(
  replicate = colnames(pb_mat_cluster0_edgeR),
  genotype  = factor(parts_cluster0[,1], levels = c("WT","LD","WT_NAC","LD_NAC")),
  animal_id = parts_cluster0[,2]
)

y_cluster0 <- DGEList(counts = pb_mat_cluster0_edgeR, samples = coldata_cluster0)
y_cluster0 <- calcNormFactors(y_cluster0, method = "TMM")

design_cluster0_edgeR <- model.matrix(~ 0 + genotype, data = y_cluster0$samples)
colnames(design_cluster0_edgeR) <- levels(coldata_cluster0$genotype)

y_cluster0 <- estimateDisp(y_cluster0, design_cluster0_edgeR)
fit_cluster0_edgeR <- glmQLFit(y_cluster0, design_cluster0_edgeR)

ct_WT_vs_LD_cluster0      <- makeContrasts(LD - WT, levels = design_cluster0_edgeR)
ct_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0  <- makeContrasts(LD_NAC - WT, levels = design_cluster0_edgeR)
ct_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0  <- makeContrasts(LD_NAC - LD, levels = design_cluster0_edgeR)
ct_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster0  <- makeContrasts(WT_NAC - WT, levels = design_cluster0_edgeR)
ct_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0  <- makeContrasts(LD_NAC - WT_NAC, levels = design_cluster0_edgeR)

res_WT_vs_LD_cluster0_edgeR     <- glmQLFTest(fit_cluster0_edgeR, contrast = ct_WT_vs_LD_cluster0)
res_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0_edgeR <- glmQLFTest(fit_cluster0_edgeR, contrast = ct_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0)
res_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0_edgeR <- glmQLFTest(fit_cluster0_edgeR, contrast = ct_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0)
res_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster0_edgeR <- glmQLFTest(fit_cluster0_edgeR, contrast = ct_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster0)
res_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0_edgeR <- glmQLFTest(fit_cluster0_edgeR, contrast = ct_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0)

tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster0     <- topTags(res_WT_vs_LD_cluster0_edgeR, n = Inf)$table
tab_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0 <- topTags(res_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0_edgeR, n = Inf)$table
tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0 <- topTags(res_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0_edgeR, n = Inf)$table
tab_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster0 <- topTags(res_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster0_edgeR, n = Inf)$table
tab_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0 <- topTags(res_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0_edgeR, n = Inf)$table


# Define the add_gene function for EdgeR results
add_gene <- function(df) { 
  df$gene <- rownames(df); 
  df[, c("gene", colnames(df)[colnames(df)!="gene"])] 
}

# Now apply the function to all EdgeR tables
tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster0     <- add_gene(tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster0)
tab_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0 <- add_gene(tab_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0)
tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0 <- add_gene(tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0)
tab_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster0 <- add_gene(tab_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster0)
tab_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0 <- add_gene(tab_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0)

# Save the results
write.csv(tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster0, file.path(save.location, "cluster0_clean_edgeR_WT_vs_LD.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(tab_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0, file.path(save.location, "cluster0_clean_edgeR_WT_vs_LD_NAC.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0, file.path(save.location, "cluster0_clean_edgeR_LD_vs_LD_NAC.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(tab_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster0, file.path(save.location, "cluster0_clean_edgeR_WT_vs_WT_NAC.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(tab_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0, file.path(save.location, "cluster0_clean_edgeR_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

```


```{r simple volcano with red dots for significance}

# Define volcano function for EdgeR results
volcano <- function(df, lfc = "logFC", p = "PValue", gene = "gene", fdr_cut = 0.05, lfc_cut = 0.25, title = "") {
  # Calculate p-value cutoff that matches the FDR threshold
  p_cut <- calculate_pvalue_cutoff(df, p = p, fdr = "FDR", fdr_cut = fdr_cut)
  
  df$signif <- with(df, ifelse(FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut, "sig", "ns"))
  
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = .data[[lfc]], y = -log10(.data[[p]]), color = signif)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 1) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-lfc_cut, lfc_cut), linetype = 2) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(ns = "grey70", sig = "red3")) +
    labs(title = title, x = "log2 fold-change", y = "-log10(p)") +
    theme_classic()
  
  # Only add the horizontal line if a valid p_cut was found
  if (!is.na(p_cut) && is.finite(p_cut)) {
    p <- p + geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(p_cut), linetype = 2)
  } else {
    warning("Could not calculate p-value cutoff for FDR = ", fdr_cut, 
            ". No horizontal line drawn.")
  }
  
  return(p)
}

# Helper function to calculate p-value cutoff for a given FDR threshold
calculate_pvalue_cutoff <- function(df, p = "PValue", fdr = "FDR", fdr_cut = 0.05) {
  # Check if required columns exist
  if (!p %in% names(df) || !fdr %in% names(df)) {
    warning("Required columns not found in data frame")
    return(NA)
  }
  
  # Get p-values and FDR values
  pvals <- df[[p]]
  fdrs <- df[[fdr]]
  
  # Filter to significant hits at the given FDR cutoff
  sig_idx <- which(fdrs < fdr_cut)
  
  if (length(sig_idx) == 0) {
    # No significant hits, return NA
    return(NA)
  }
  
  # Find the maximum p-value among significant hits
  # This represents the p-value cutoff that would give us exactly these significant hits
  p_cut <- max(pvals[sig_idx], na.rm = TRUE)
  
  return(p_cut)
}

# Create a list of plots
plots_cluster0 <- list(
  volcano(tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster0, title = "Cluster 0: WT vs LD"),
  volcano(tab_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0, title = "Cluster 0: WT vs LD_NAC"),
  volcano(tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0, title = "Cluster 0: LD vs LD_NAC"),
  volcano(tab_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster0, title = "Cluster 0: WT vs WT_NAC"),
  volcano(tab_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0, title = "Cluster 0: WT_NAC vs LD_NAC")
)

# Save as multi-page PDF
ggsave("cluster0_clean_edgeR_volcano_plots.pdf", 
       plot = gridExtra::marrangeGrob(plots_cluster0, nrow = 1, ncol = 1), 
       width = 8.5, height = 11, device = "pdf")

```

```{r volcano with 22q11 genes labeled in green}
volcano <- function(df, lfc = "logFC", p = "PValue", gene = "gene", fdr_cut = 0.05, lfc_cut = 0.25, title = "") {
  # Define 22q11 genes
  x22q11_genes <- c("Ranbp1", "Dgcr8", "Cdc45", "Trmt2a", "Comt", "Tango2", "Mrpl40", 
                    "Slc25a1", "Zdhhc8", "Txnrd2", "Hira", "Prodh")
  
  # Calculate p-value cutoff that matches the FDR threshold
  p_cut <- calculate_pvalue_cutoff(df, p = p, fdr = "FDR", fdr_cut = fdr_cut)
  
  # Create significance and 22q11 annotation
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      signif = case_when(
        FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut & gene %in% x22q11_genes ~ "22q11_sig",
        FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut ~ "sig",
        TRUE ~ "ns"
      ),
      # Create a label column for 22q11 genes
      label = ifelse(gene %in% x22q11_genes & signif != "ns", gene, "")
    )
  
  # Create the plot
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = .data[[lfc]], y = -log10(.data[[p]]), color = signif)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 1) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-lfc_cut, lfc_cut), linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
    # Add labels for 22q11 genes
    geom_text_repel(
      aes(label = label),
      size = 3,
      color = "darkgreen",
      fontface = "bold",
      max.overlaps = 20,
      box.padding = 0.5,
      segment.color = "darkgreen",
      segment.size = 0.5
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "22q11_sig" = "darkgreen",  # 22q11 genes that are significant
        "sig" = "red3",             # Other significant genes
        "ns" = "grey70"             # Not significant
      ),
      labels = c("22q11 Significant", "Other Significant", "Not significant")
    ) +
    labs(title = title, x = "log2 fold-change", y = "-log10(p)") +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_blank()
    )
  
  # Only add the horizontal line if a valid p_cut was found
  if (!is.na(p_cut) && is.finite(p_cut)) {
    p <- p + geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(p_cut), linetype = 2, color = "gray50")
  } else {
    warning("Could not calculate p-value cutoff for FDR = ", fdr_cut, 
            ". No horizontal line drawn.")
  }
  
  return(p)
}

# Alternative version with different styling for 22q11 genes
volcano_22q11_highlight <- function(df, lfc = "logFC", p = "PValue", gene = "gene", 
                                   fdr_cut = 0.05, lfc_cut = 0.25, title = "") {
  # Define 22q11 genes
  x22q11_genes <- c("Ranbp1", "Dgcr8", "Cdc45", "Trmt2a", "Comt", "Tango2", "Mrpl40", 
                    "Slc25a1", "Zdhhc8", "Txnrd2", "Hira", "Prodh")
  
  # Calculate p-value cutoff that matches the FDR threshold
  p_cut <- calculate_pvalue_cutoff(df, p = p, fdr = "FDR", fdr_cut = fdr_cut)
  
  # Create significance categories
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      category = case_when(
        FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut & gene %in% x22q11_genes ~ "22q11 Significant",
        FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut ~ "Other Significant",
        TRUE ~ "Not significant"
      ),
      # Create a label column for 22q11 genes
      label = ifelse(gene %in% x22q11_genes & category != "Not significant", gene, "")
    )
  
  # Create the plot
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = .data[[lfc]], y = -log10(.data[[p]]), color = category, size = category)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-lfc_cut, lfc_cut), linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
    # Add labels for 22q11 genes
    geom_text_repel(
      aes(label = label),
      size = 3.5,
      color = "darkgreen",
      fontface = "bold",
      max.overlaps = 20,
      box.padding = 0.5,
      segment.color = "darkgreen",
      segment.size = 0.5,
      min.segment.length = 0
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "22q11 Significant" = "darkgreen",
        "Other Significant" = "red3",
        "Not significant" = "grey70"
      )
    ) +
    scale_size_manual(
      values = c(
        "22q11 Significant" = 2,
        "Other Significant" = 1.5,
        "Not significant" = 1
      )
    ) +
    labs(title = title, x = "log2 fold-change", y = "-log10(p-value)") +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
    )
  
  # Only add the horizontal line if a valid p_cut was found
  if (!is.na(p_cut) && is.finite(p_cut)) {
    p <- p + geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(p_cut), linetype = 2, color = "gray50")
  }
  
  return(p)
}

# Create a list of plots with 22q11 highlighting
plots_cluster0 <- list(
  volcano_22q11_highlight(tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster0, title = "Cluster 0: WT vs LD"),
  volcano_22q11_highlight(tab_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0, title = "Cluster 0: WT vs LD_NAC"),
  volcano_22q11_highlight(tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0, title = "Cluster 0: LD vs LD_NAC"),
  volcano_22q11_highlight(tab_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster0, title = "Cluster 0: WT vs WT_NAC"),
  volcano_22q11_highlight(tab_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0, title = "Cluster 0: WT_NAC vs LD_NAC")
)

# Save as multi-page PDF
ggsave("cluster0_clean_edgeR_volcano_plots_22q11_highlighted.pdf", 
       plot = gridExtra::marrangeGrob(plots_cluster0, nrow = 1, ncol = 1), 
       width = 8.5, height = 11, device = "pdf")

# Also save individual plots for easier viewing
for (i in 1:length(plots_cluster0)) {
  comparison_name <- c("WT_vs_LD", "WT_vs_LD_NAC", "LD_vs_LD_NAC", "WT_vs_WT_NAC", "WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC")[i]
  ggsave(paste0("cluster0_clean_edgeR_volcano_", comparison_name, "_22q11_highlighted.pdf"), 
         plots_cluster0[[i]], width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
}

# Print summary of 22q11 gene significance
print("22q11 Gene Significance Summary:")
for (i in 1:length(plots_cluster0)) {
  comparison_name <- c("WT_vs_LD", "WT_vs_LD_NAC", "LD_vs_LD_NAC", "WT_vs_WT_NAC", "WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC")[i]
  df_list <- list(tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster0, tab_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0, tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0, 
                  tab_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster0, tab_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0)
  current_df <- df_list[[i]]
  
  sig_22q11 <- current_df %>%
    filter(gene %in% x22q11_genes & FDR < 0.05 & abs(logFC) >= 0.25)
  
  print(paste(comparison_name, ":", nrow(sig_22q11), "significant 22q11 genes"))
  if (nrow(sig_22q11) > 0) {
    print(sig_22q11 %>% select(gene, logFC, FDR))
  }
}


```

```{volcano with LD and LD-NAC specific DE genes}



# LD_NAC specific genes
LD_NAC_specific_genes <- c(
  "Wif1", "Npas4", "Rgs2", "Lgi2", "Slitrk6", "Nr4a2", "Rcan2", "Adcyap1", 
  "Nap1l5", "Omg", "Grm2", "Hdac9", "Osbpl3", "Spock3", "Aox1", 
  "Srxn1", "Sidt1", "Ngef", "Osgin1", "Hcn1", "Egr1"
)

# LD specific genes  
LD_specific_genes <- c(
  "Gucy1a2", "Vps13c", "Mirg", "Nyap2", "Pclo", "Lnpep", "Atm", "Proser1", 
  "B9d2"
)

# Print confirmation
print(paste("LD_NAC_specific_genes:", length(LD_NAC_specific_genes), "genes"))
print(paste("LD_specific_genes:", length(LD_specific_genes), "genes"))

# Define volcano function for EdgeR results with two gene set highlighting
volcano_two_sets <- function(df, lfc = "logFC", p = "PValue", gene = "gene", 
                            fdr_cut = 0.05, lfc_cut = 0.25, title = "") {
  
  # Calculate p-value cutoff that matches the FDR threshold
  p_cut <- calculate_pvalue_cutoff(df, p = p, fdr = "FDR", fdr_cut = fdr_cut)
  
  # Create gene set categories
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      gene_set = case_when(
        gene %in% LD_specific_genes & FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut ~ "LD Specific",
        gene %in% LD_NAC_specific_genes & FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut ~ "LD_NAC Specific",
        FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut ~ "Other Significant",
        TRUE ~ "Not significant"
      ),
      # Create label column
      label = case_when(
        gene_set == "LD Specific" ~ gene,
        gene_set == "LD_NAC Specific" ~ gene,
        TRUE ~ ""
      )
    )
  
  # Create the plot
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = .data[[lfc]], y = -log10(.data[[p]]), color = gene_set, size = gene_set)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-lfc_cut, lfc_cut), linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
    # Add labels for both gene sets
    geom_text_repel(
      aes(label = label, color = gene_set),
      size = 3.2,
      fontface = "bold",
      max.overlaps = 30,
      box.padding = 0.6,
      segment.size = 0.5,
      min.segment.length = 0,
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "LD Specific" = "darkcyan",
        "LD_NAC Specific" = "darkmagenta",
        "Other Significant" = "red3",
        "Not significant" = "grey70"
      )
    ) +
    scale_size_manual(
      values = c(
        "LD Specific" = 2,
        "LD_NAC Specific" = 2,
        "Other Significant" = 1.5,
        "Not significant" = 1
      )
    ) +
    labs(
      title = title, 
      x = "log2 fold-change", 
      y = "-log10(p-value)"
    ) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 12),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 10),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 9)
    ) +
    # Ensure symmetrical x-axis
    expand_limits(x = symmetric_limits(df[[lfc]]))
  
  # Only add the horizontal line if a valid p_cut was found
  if (!is.na(p_cut) && is.finite(p_cut)) {
    p <- p + geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(p_cut), linetype = 2, color = "gray50")
  }
  
  return(p)
}

# Create a list of plots with two gene set highlighting
plots_cluster0_two_sets <- list(
  volcano_two_sets(tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster0, title = "Cluster 0: WT vs LD"),
  volcano_two_sets(tab_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0, title = "Cluster 0: WT vs LD_NAC"),
  volcano_two_sets(tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0, title = "Cluster 0: LD vs LD_NAC"),
  volcano_two_sets(tab_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster0, title = "Cluster 0: WT vs WT_NAC"),
  volcano_two_sets(tab_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0, title = "Cluster 0: WT_NAC vs LD_NAC")
)

# Save as multi-page PDF
ggsave("cluster0_clean_edgeR_volcano_plots_two_sets.pdf", 
       plot = gridExtra::marrangeGrob(plots_cluster0_two_sets, nrow = 1, ncol = 1), 
       width = 9, height = 11, device = "pdf")

# Also save individual plots for easier viewing
for (i in 1:length(plots_cluster0_two_sets)) {
  comparison_name <- c("WT_vs_LD", "WT_vs_LD_NAC", "LD_vs_LD_NAC", "WT_vs_WT_NAC", "WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC")[i]
  ggsave(paste0("cluster0_clean_edgeR_volcano_", comparison_name, "_two_sets.pdf"), 
         plots_cluster0_two_sets[[i]], width = 9, height = 7, dpi = 300)
}

# Print summary of gene set significance
print("Gene Set Significance Summary:")
comparison_names <- c("WT_vs_LD", "WT_vs_LD_NAC", "LD_vs_LD_NAC", "WT_vs_WT_NAC", "WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC")
df_list <- list(tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster0, tab_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0, tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0, 
                tab_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster0, tab_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0)

for (i in 1:length(df_list)) {
  current_df <- df_list[[i]]
  
  sig_LD <- current_df %>%
    filter(gene %in% LD_specific_genes & FDR < 0.05 & abs(logFC) >= 0.25)
  
  sig_LD_NAC <- current_df %>%
    filter(gene %in% LD_NAC_specific_genes & FDR < 0.05 & abs(logFC) >= 0.25)
  
  print(paste("====", comparison_names[i], "===="))
  print(paste("LD specific genes:", nrow(sig_LD), "significant"))
  if (nrow(sig_LD) > 0) print(sig_LD %>% select(gene, logFC, FDR))
  
  print(paste("LD_NAC specific genes:", nrow(sig_LD_NAC), "significant"))
  if (nrow(sig_LD_NAC) > 0) print(sig_LD_NAC %>% select(gene, logFC, FDR))
  print("")
}









```

```{r mito/metabolism specific response genes}

# Define the two gene lists for mitochondrial/metabolism and 22q11
mitochondrial_metabolism_genes <- c( "Park7", "Prdx5","Ddit4", "Sirt3", 
  "Foxo3", "Nfe2l2", "Sesn2",  "Uqcrc1", "Bhlhe40", "Hmox1", "Nfkb1", "Mtor", "Tsc1", "Slc38a1", "Cat", "Prdx2", "Sod2",  "Psmb5","Gstp1", "Hif1a", "Prdx1", "Uqcrc2", "Sod1",
  "Txnrd1", "Tsc2"
  
)

in_vitro_de_genes <- c(
  "Wif1", "Npas4", "Rgs2", "Lgi2", "Slitrk6", "Nr4a2", "Rcan2", "Adcyap1", 
  "Nap1l5", "Omg", "Grm2", "Hdac9", "Osbpl3", "Spock3", "Aox1", 
  "Srxn1", "Sidt1", "Ngef", "Osgin1", "Hcn1", "Egr1", "Gucy1a2", "Vps13c", "Mirg", "Nyap2", "Pclo", "Lnpep", "Atm", "Proser1", 
  "B9d2"
)

x22q11_genes <- c("Ranbp1", "Dgcr8", "Cdc45", "Trmt2a", "Comt", "Tango2", "Mrpl40", 
                  "Slc25a1", "Zdhhc8", "Txnrd2", "Hira", "Prodh")

# Print confirmation
print(paste("Mitochondrial/Metabolism genes:", length(mitochondrial_metabolism_genes), "genes"))
print(paste("22q11 genes:", length(x22q11_genes), "genes"))

# Define volcano function for EdgeR results with mitochondrial/metabolism and 22q11 highlighting
volcano_mito_22q11 <- function(df, lfc = "logFC", p = "PValue", gene = "gene", 
                              fdr_cut = 0.05, lfc_cut = 0.25, title = "") {
  
  # Calculate p-value cutoff that matches the FDR threshold
  p_cut <- calculate_pvalue_cutoff(df, p = p, fdr = "FDR", fdr_cut = fdr_cut)
  
  # Create gene set categories
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      gene_set = case_when(
        gene %in% x22q11_genes & FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut ~ "22q11 Significant",
        gene %in% mitochondrial_metabolism_genes & FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut ~ "Mito/Metab Significant",
        FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut ~ "Other Significant",
        TRUE ~ "Not significant"
      ),
      # Create label column
      label = case_when(
        gene_set == "22q11 Significant" ~ gene,
        gene_set == "Mito/Metab Significant" ~ gene,
        TRUE ~ ""
      )
    )
  
  # Create the plot
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = .data[[lfc]], y = -log10(.data[[p]]), color = gene_set, size = gene_set)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-lfc_cut, lfc_cut), linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
    # Add encircling for 22q11 genes
    geom_point(data = subset(df, gene_set == "22q11 Significant"), 
               shape = 1, size = 3, color = "darkgreen", stroke = 1.2) +
    # Add encircling for mitochondrial/metabolism genes
    geom_point(data = subset(df, gene_set == "Mito/Metab Significant"), 
               shape = 1, size = 3, color = "darkorange", stroke = 1.2) +
    # Add labels for both gene sets
    geom_text_repel(
      aes(label = label, color = gene_set),
      size = 3.2,
      fontface = "bold",
      max.overlaps = 30,
      box.padding = 0.6,
      segment.size = 0.5,
      min.segment.length = 0,
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "22q11 Significant" = "darkgreen",
        "Mito/Metab Significant" = "darkorange",
        "Other Significant" = "red3",
        "Not significant" = "grey70"
      )
    ) +
    scale_size_manual(
      values = c(
        "22q11 Significant" = 2.5,
        "Mito/Metab Significant" = 2.5,
        "Other Significant" = 1.5,
        "Not significant" = 1
      )
    ) +
    labs(
      title = title, 
      x = "log2 fold-change", 
      y = "-log10(p-value)"
    ) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 12),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 10),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 9)
    ) +
    # Ensure symmetrical x-axis
    expand_limits(x = symmetric_limits(df[[lfc]]))
  
  # Only add the horizontal line if a valid p_cut was found
  if (!is.na(p_cut) && is.finite(p_cut)) {
    p <- p + geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(p_cut), linetype = 2, color = "gray50")
  }
  
  return(p)
}

# Create a list of plots with mitochondrial/metabolism and 22q11 highlighting
plots_cluster0_mito_22q11 <- list(
  volcano_mito_22q11(tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster0, title = "Cluster 0: WT vs LD"),
  volcano_mito_22q11(tab_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0, title = "Cluster 0: WT vs LD_NAC"),
  volcano_mito_22q11(tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0, title = "Cluster 0: LD vs LD_NAC"),
  volcano_mito_22q11(tab_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster0, title = "Cluster 0: WT vs WT_NAC"),
  volcano_mito_22q11(tab_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0, title = "Cluster 0: WT_NAC vs LD_NAC")
)

# Save as multi-page PDF
ggsave("cluster0_clean_edgeR_volcano_plots_mito_22q11.pdf", 
       plot = gridExtra::marrangeGrob(plots_cluster0_mito_22q11, nrow = 1, ncol = 1), 
       width = 9, height = 11, device = "pdf")

# Also save individual plots for easier viewing
for (i in 1:length(plots_cluster0_mito_22q11)) {
  comparison_name <- c("WT_vs_LD", "WT_vs_LD_NAC", "LD_vs_LD_NAC", "WT_vs_WT_NAC", "WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC")[i]
  ggsave(paste0("cluster0_clean_edgeR_volcano_", comparison_name, "_mito_22q11.pdf"), 
         plots_cluster0_mito_22q11[[i]], width = 9, height = 7, dpi = 300)
}

# Print summary of gene set significance
print("Mitochondrial/Metabolism and 22q11 Gene Set Significance Summary:")
comparison_names <- c("WT_vs_LD", "WT_vs_LD_NAC", "LD_vs_LD_NAC", "WT_vs_WT_NAC", "WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC")
df_list <- list(tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster0, tab_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0, tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0, 
                tab_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster0, tab_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0)

for (i in 1:length(df_list)) {
  current_df <- df_list[[i]]
  
  sig_22q11 <- current_df %>%
    filter(gene %in% x22q11_genes & FDR < 0.05 & abs(logFC) >= 0.25)
  
  sig_mito <- current_df %>%
    filter(gene %in% mitochondrial_metabolism_genes & FDR < 0.05 & abs(logFC) >= 0.25)
  
  print(paste("====", comparison_names[i], "===="))
  print(paste("22q11 genes:", nrow(sig_22q11), "significant"))
  if (nrow(sig_22q11) > 0) print(sig_22q11 %>% select(gene, logFC, FDR))
  
  print(paste("Mitochondrial/Metabolism genes:", nrow(sig_mito), "significant"))
  if (nrow(sig_mito) > 0) print(sig_mito %>% select(gene, logFC, FDR))
  print("")
}


```


```{r heatmaps}


pdf("Cluster0_clean_all_heatmaps_by_genotype.pdf", width = 10, height = 12)

gene_sets <- list(
  "Mitochondrial/metabolism" = c("Park7", "Prdx5","Ddit4", "Sirt3", 
  "Foxo3", "Nfe2l2", "Sesn2",  "Uqcrc1", "Bhlhe40", "Hmox1", "Nfkb1", "Mtor", "Tsc1", "Slc38a1", "Cat", "Prdx2", "Sod2",  "Psmb5","Gstp1", "Hif1a", "Prdx1", "Uqcrc2", "Sod1",
  "Txnrd1", "Tsc2"),

  "LDvsLD-NAC specific" = c("Wif1", "Npas4", "Rgs2", "Lgi2", "Slitrk6", "Nr4a2", "Rcan2",
                            "Adcyap1", "Nap1l5", "Omg", "Grm2", "Hdac9", "Osbpl3", "Spock3",
                            "Aox1", "Srxn1", "Sidt1", "Ngef", "Osgin1", "Hcn1", "Egr1"),

  "WTvsLD specific" = c("Gucy1a2", "Vps13c", "Mirg", "Nyap2", "Pclo", "Lnpep", "Atm", "Proser1",
                        "B9d2"),
  "WTvsLD specific non-DE 50-100" = c("Dcc", "Nfat5", "Ccdc82", "Unc80", "Arfgef3", "Fzd3", "Klf12",
                        "Fkbp2", "Hes5", "Olig1", "Uqcc3", "Prr7", "Lmo1", "Zfp771",
                        "Nnat", "Zfyve16", "Klhl11", "Ccdc124"),

  "22q11 Genes" = c("Ranbp1", "Dgcr8", "Cdc45", "Trmt2a", "Comt", "Tango2", "Mrpl40",
                    "Slc25a1", "Zdhhc8", "Txnrd2", "Hira", "Prodh"),
  "11 NAC common Genes figure 4" = c("Grm2", "Wif1", "Lgi2", "Rgs2", "Srxn1", "Osgin1"),
    
    "14 NAC LD specific Genes figure 4" = c("Hcn1", "Aox1", "Hdac9", "Nap1l5", "Adcyap1", "Nr4a2")
)

genotype_order <- c("WT", "LD", "LD-NAC", "WT-NAC")






for (set_name in names(gene_sets)) {
  genes_found <- gene_sets[[set_name]][gene_sets[[set_name]] %in% rownames(cluster_0_clean)]
  if (length(genes_found) == 0) {
    cat("No genes found for", set_name, "\n")
    next
  }

  cat("Processing", set_name, "with", length(genes_found), "genes\n")

  avg_expression <- AverageExpression(
    cluster_0_clean,
    features = genes_found,
    group.by = "genotype",
    assays = names(Assays(cluster_0_clean))[1],
    slot = "data"
  )[[1]]

  # Convert sparse to dense matrix (important!)
  avg_expression <- as.matrix(avg_expression)

  # Match genotype order
  cols_to_use <- intersect(genotype_order, colnames(avg_expression))
  if (length(cols_to_use) == 0) next
  avg_expression <- avg_expression[, cols_to_use, drop = FALSE]

  # Scale and clean
  mat_scaled <- t(scale(t(avg_expression)))
  mat_scaled[is.na(mat_scaled)] <- 0
  col_fun <- colorRamp2(c(-2, 0, 2), c("navy", "white", "firebrick"))

  # Heatmap
  hm <- Heatmap(
    mat_scaled,
    name = "Z-score",
    cluster_rows = TRUE,
      row_order = genes_found,
    cluster_columns = FALSE,
    col = col_fun,
    row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
    column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
    heatmap_legend_param = list(title = "Expression (z)"),
    column_title = paste("Cluster 0 -", set_name, "(", length(genes_found), "genes)"),
    show_row_names = TRUE
  )

  draw(hm)
  grid.newpage()
}

dev.off()
cat("✅ Saved: Cluster0_subset_all_heatmaps_by_genotype.pdf\n")

```

```{r volcano significant only gene with 3 labels}
# Load required packages
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)

# Define helper functions first
calculate_pvalue_cutoff <- function(df, p = "PValue", fdr = "FDR", fdr_cut = 0.05) {
  if (!fdr %in% colnames(df)) {
    warning("FDR column not found, using PValue column instead")
    # Find the p-value that corresponds to the desired FDR cutoff
    df_sorted <- df[order(df[[p]]), ]
    df_sorted$rank <- 1:nrow(df_sorted)
    df_sorted$fdr_estimated <- df_sorted[[p]] * nrow(df_sorted) / df_sorted$rank
    p_cut <- max(df_sorted[[p]][df_sorted$fdr_estimated <= fdr_cut], na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    # Find the p-value that corresponds to the desired FDR cutoff
    df_sorted <- df[order(df[[p]]), ]
    p_cut <- max(df_sorted[[p]][df_sorted[[fdr]] <= fdr_cut], na.rm = TRUE)
  }
  return(p_cut)
}

symmetric_limits <- function(x) {
  max_abs <- max(abs(x), na.rm = TRUE)
  c(-max_abs, max_abs)
}

# Define the three gene lists for mitochondrial/metabolism, 22q11, and in vitro DE genes
mitochondrial_metabolism_genes <- c( "Park7", "Prdx5","Ddit4", "Sirt3", 
  "Foxo3", "Nfe2l2", "Sesn2",  "Uqcrc1", "Bhlhe40", "Hmox1", "Nfkb1", "Mtor", "Tsc1", "Slc38a1", "Cat", "Prdx2", "Sod2",  "Psmb5","Gstp1", "Hif1a", "Prdx1", "Uqcrc2", "Sod1",
  "Txnrd1", "Tsc2"
)

in_vitro_de_genes <- c(
  "Wif1", "Npas4", "Rgs2", "Lgi2", "Slitrk6", "Nr4a2", "Rcan2", "Adcyap1", 
  "Nap1l5", "Omg", "Grm2", "Hdac9", "Osbpl3", "Spock3", "Aox1", 
  "Srxn1", "Sidt1", "Ngef", "Osgin1", "Hcn1", "Egr1", "Gucy1a2", "Vps13c", "Mirg", "Nyap2", "Pclo", "Lnpep", "Atm", "Proser1", 
  "B9d2"
)

x22q11_genes <- c("Ranbp1", "Dgcr8", "Cdc45", "Trmt2a", "Comt", "Tango2", "Mrpl40", 
                  "Slc25a1", "Zdhhc8", "Txnrd2", "Hira", "Prodh")

# Print confirmation
print(paste("Mitochondrial/Metabolism genes:", length(mitochondrial_metabolism_genes), "genes"))
print(paste("In vitro DE genes:", length(in_vitro_de_genes), "genes"))
print(paste("22q11 genes:", length(x22q11_genes), "genes"))

# Define volcano function for EdgeR results with all three gene sets highlighting
volcano_mito_22q11_invitro <- function(df, lfc = "logFC", p = "PValue", gene = "gene", 
                              fdr_cut = 0.05, lfc_cut = 0.25, title = "") {
  
  # Calculate p-value cutoff that matches the FDR threshold
  p_cut <- calculate_pvalue_cutoff(df, p = p, fdr = "FDR", fdr_cut = fdr_cut)
  
  # Create gene set categories
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      gene_set = case_when(
        gene %in% x22q11_genes & FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut ~ "22q11 Significant",
        gene %in% mitochondrial_metabolism_genes & FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut ~ "Mito/Metab Significant",
        gene %in% in_vitro_de_genes & FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut ~ "In vitro DE Significant",
        FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut ~ "Other Significant",
        TRUE ~ "Not significant"
      ),
      # Create label column
      label = case_when(
        gene_set == "22q11 Significant" ~ gene,
        gene_set == "Mito/Metab Significant" ~ gene,
        gene_set == "In vitro DE Significant" ~ gene,
        TRUE ~ ""
      )
    )
  
  # Filter to show only significant points for cleaner visualization
  df_sig <- df %>% filter(FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut)
  
  # Create the plot with only significant points
  p <- ggplot(df_sig, aes(x = .data[[lfc]], y = -log10(.data[[p]]), color = gene_set, size = gene_set)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-lfc_cut, lfc_cut), linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
    # Add encircling for 22q11 genes
    geom_point(data = subset(df_sig, gene_set == "22q11 Significant"), 
               shape = 1, size = 3, color = "darkgreen", stroke = 1.2) +
    # Add encircling for mitochondrial/metabolism genes
    geom_point(data = subset(df_sig, gene_set == "Mito/Metab Significant"), 
               shape = 1, size = 3, color = "darkorange", stroke = 1.2) +
    # Add encircling for in vitro DE genes
    geom_point(data = subset(df_sig, gene_set == "In vitro DE Significant"), 
               shape = 1, size = 3, color = "darkgrey", stroke = 1.2) +
    # Add labels for all three gene sets
    geom_text_repel(
      aes(label = label, color = gene_set),
      size = 3.2,
      fontface = "bold",
      max.overlaps = 50,
      box.padding = 0.6,
      segment.size = 0.5,
      min.segment.length = 0,
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "22q11 Significant" = "darkgreen",
        "Mito/Metab Significant" = "darkorange",
        "In vitro DE Significant" = "darkgrey",
        "Other Significant" = "red3"
      )
    ) +
    scale_size_manual(
      values = c(
        "22q11 Significant" = 2.5,
        "Mito/Metab Significant" = 2.5,
        "In vitro DE Significant" = 2.5,
        "Other Significant" = 1.5
      )
    ) +
    labs(
      title = title, 
      x = "log2 fold-change", 
      y = "-log10(p-value)"
    ) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 12),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 10),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 9)
    ) +
    # Ensure symmetrical x-axis
    expand_limits(x = symmetric_limits(df_sig[[lfc]]))
  
  # Only add the horizontal line if a valid p_cut was found
  if (!is.na(p_cut) && is.finite(p_cut)) {
    p <- p + geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(p_cut), linetype = 2, color = "gray50")
  }
  
  return(p)
}

# Alternative version that shows ALL points but focuses on significant region
volcano_mito_22q11_invitro_focused <- function(df, lfc = "logFC", p = "PValue", gene = "gene", 
                                      fdr_cut = 0.05, lfc_cut = 0.25, title = "") {
  
  # Calculate p-value cutoff that matches the FDR threshold
  p_cut <- calculate_pvalue_cutoff(df, p = p, fdr = "FDR", fdr_cut = fdr_cut)
  
  # Create gene set categories
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      gene_set = case_when(
        gene %in% x22q11_genes & FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut ~ "22q11 Significant",
        gene %in% mitochondrial_metabolism_genes & FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut ~ "Mito/Metab Significant",
        gene %in% in_vitro_de_genes & FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut ~ "In vitro DE Significant",
        FDR < fdr_cut & abs(get(lfc)) >= lfc_cut ~ "Other Significant",
        TRUE ~ "Not significant"
      ),
      # Create label column
      label = case_when(
        gene_set == "22q11 Significant" ~ gene,
        gene_set == "Mito/Metab Significant" ~ gene,
        gene_set == "In vitro DE Significant" ~ gene,
        TRUE ~ ""
      )
    )
  
  # Create the plot
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = .data[[lfc]], y = -log10(.data[[p]]), color = gene_set, size = gene_set)) +
    # Plot non-significant points in light grey and smaller
    geom_point(data = subset(df, gene_set == "Not significant"), 
               alpha = 0.3, color = "grey80", size = 0.8) +
    # Plot significant points
    geom_point(data = subset(df, gene_set != "Not significant"), alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-lfc_cut, lfc_cut), linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
    # Add encircling for 22q11 genes
    geom_point(data = subset(df, gene_set == "22q11 Significant"), 
               shape = 1, size = 3, color = "darkgreen", stroke = 1.2) +
    # Add encircling for mitochondrial/metabolism genes
    geom_point(data = subset(df, gene_set == "Mito/Metab Significant"), 
               shape = 1, size = 3, color = "darkorange", stroke = 1.2) +
    # Add encircling for in vitro DE genes
    geom_point(data = subset(df, gene_set == "In vitro DE Significant"), 
               shape = 1, size = 3, color = "darkgrey", stroke = 1.2) +
    # Add labels for all three gene sets
    geom_text_repel(
      aes(label = label, color = gene_set),
      size = 3.2,
      fontface = "bold",
      max.overlaps = 50,
      box.padding = 0.6,
      segment.size = 0.5,
      min.segment.length = 0,
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "22q11 Significant" = "darkgreen",
        "Mito/Metab Significant" = "darkorange",
        "In vitro DE Significant" = "darkgrey",
        "Other Significant" = "red3",
        "Not significant" = "grey80"
      )
    ) +
    scale_size_manual(
      values = c(
        "22q11 Significant" = 2.5,
        "Mito/Metab Significant" = 2.5,
        "In vitro DE Significant" = 2.5,
        "Other Significant" = 1.5,
        "Not significant" = 0.8
      )
    ) +
    labs(
      title = title, 
      x = "log2 fold-change", 
      y = "-log10(p-value)"
    ) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 12),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 10),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 9)
    ) +
    # Ensure symmetrical x-axis
    expand_limits(x = symmetric_limits(df[[lfc]])) +
    # Focus on significant region by setting y-axis limits
    ylim(-log10(p_cut) * 0.8, max(-log10(df[[p]][is.finite(-log10(df[[p]]))]), na.rm = TRUE) * 1.05)
  
  # Only add the horizontal line if a valid p_cut was found
  if (!is.na(p_cut) && is.finite(p_cut)) {
    p <- p + geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(p_cut), linetype = 2, color = "gray50")
  }
  
  return(p)
}

# Create a list of plots with all three gene sets highlighting (significance-only version)
plots_cluster0_all_genesets_sig <- list(
  volcano_mito_22q11_invitro(tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster0, title = "Cluster 0: WT vs LD"),
  volcano_mito_22q11_invitro(tab_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0, title = "Cluster 0: WT vs LD_NAC"),
  volcano_mito_22q11_invitro(tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0, title = "Cluster 0: LD vs LD_NAC"),
  volcano_mito_22q11_invitro(tab_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster0, title = "Cluster 0: WT vs WT_NAC"),
  volcano_mito_22q11_invitro(tab_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0, title = "Cluster 0: WT_NAC vs LD_NAC")
)

# Create a list of plots with all three gene sets highlighting (focused version)
plots_cluster0_all_genesets_focused <- list(
  volcano_mito_22q11_invitro_focused(tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster0, title = "Cluster 0: WT vs LD"),
  volcano_mito_22q11_invitro_focused(tab_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0, title = "Cluster 0: WT vs LD_NAC"),
  volcano_mito_22q11_invitro_focused(tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0, title = "Cluster 0: LD vs LD_NAC"),
  volcano_mito_22q11_invitro_focused(tab_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster0, title = "Cluster 0: WT vs WT_NAC"),
  volcano_mito_22q11_invitro_focused(tab_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0, title = "Cluster 0: WT_NAC vs LD_NAC")
)

# Save both versions as multi-page PDFs
ggsave("cluster0_edgeR_volcano_significant_only_three_genesets.pdf", 
       plot = gridExtra::marrangeGrob(plots_cluster0_all_genesets_sig, nrow = 1, ncol = 1), 
       width = 9, height = 11, device = "pdf")

ggsave("cluster0_edgeR_volcano_focused_three_genesets.pdf", 
       plot = gridExtra::marrangeGrob(plots_cluster0_all_genesets_focused, nrow = 1, ncol = 1), 
       width = 9, height = 11, device = "pdf")

# Also save individual plots for easier viewing
comparison_names <- c("WT_vs_LD", "WT_vs_LD_NAC", "LD_vs_LD_NAC", "WT_vs_WT_NAC", "WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC")

for (i in 1:length(plots_cluster0_all_genesets_sig)) {
  ggsave(paste0("cluster0_edgeR_volcano_", comparison_names[i], "_significant_only_three_genesets.pdf"), 
         plots_cluster0_all_genesets_sig[[i]], width = 9, height = 7, dpi = 300)
}

for (i in 1:length(plots_cluster0_all_genesets_focused)) {
  ggsave(paste0("cluster0_edgeR_volcano_", comparison_names[i], "_focused_three_genesets.pdf"), 
         plots_cluster0_all_genesets_focused[[i]], width = 9, height = 7, dpi = 300)
}

# Print summary of gene set significance for all three gene sets
print("Mitochondrial/Metabolism, In vitro DE, and 22q11 Gene Set Significance Summary:")
comparison_names <- c("WT_vs_LD", "WT_vs_LD_NAC", "LD_vs_LD_NAC", "WT_vs_WT_NAC", "WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC")
df_list <- list(tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster0, tab_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0, tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0, 
                tab_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster0, tab_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0)

for (i in 1:length(df_list)) {
  current_df <- df_list[[i]]
  
  sig_22q11 <- current_df %>%
    filter(gene %in% x22q11_genes & FDR < 0.05 & abs(logFC) >= 0.25)
  
  sig_mito <- current_df %>%
    filter(gene %in% mitochondrial_metabolism_genes & FDR < 0.05 & abs(logFC) >= 0.25)
  
  sig_invitro <- current_df %>%
    filter(gene %in% in_vitro_de_genes & FDR < 0.05 & abs(logFC) >= 0.25)
  
  print(paste("====", comparison_names[i], "===="))
  print(paste("22q11 genes:", nrow(sig_22q11), "significant"))
  if (nrow(sig_22q11) > 0) {
    # Use base R subsetting instead of dplyr::select
    print(sig_22q11[, c("gene", "logFC", "FDR")])
  }
  
  print(paste("Mitochondrial/Metabolism genes:", nrow(sig_mito), "significant"))
  if (nrow(sig_mito) > 0) {
    print(sig_mito[, c("gene", "logFC", "FDR")])
  }
  
  print(paste("In vitro DE genes:", nrow(sig_invitro), "significant"))
  if (nrow(sig_invitro) > 0) {
    print(sig_invitro[, c("gene", "logFC", "FDR")])
  }
  print("")
}

# Create a comprehensive summary table
summary_table <- data.frame()
for (i in 1:length(df_list)) {
  current_df <- df_list[[i]]
  
  sig_22q11 <- current_df %>%
    filter(gene %in% x22q11_genes & FDR < 0.05 & abs(logFC) >= 0.25)
  
  sig_mito <- current_df %>%
    filter(gene %in% mitochondrial_metabolism_genes & FDR < 0.05 & abs(logFC) >= 0.25)
  
  sig_invitro <- current_df %>%
    filter(gene %in% in_vitro_de_genes & FDR < 0.05 & abs(logFC) >= 0.25)
  
  comp_summary <- data.frame(
    Comparison = comparison_names[i],
    Total_22q11_genes = length(x22q11_genes),
    Significant_22q11 = nrow(sig_22q11),
    Total_Mito_Metab_genes = length(mitochondrial_metabolism_genes),
    Significant_Mito_Metab = nrow(sig_mito),
    Total_InVitro_DE_genes = length(in_vitro_de_genes),
    Significant_InVitro_DE = nrow(sig_invitro)
  )
  
  summary_table <- rbind(summary_table, comp_summary)
}

print("Comprehensive Summary Table:")
print(summary_table)
write.csv(summary_table, "cluster0_gene_set_significance_summary.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```

```{r subset all mito genes 8 columns}
# Use all cells from both clusters (all genotypes)
cluster_0_all <- cluster_0_clean
cluster_2_all <- cluster_2_clean

# Check cell counts by genotype
print("Cluster 0 cell counts by genotype:")
print(table(cluster_0_all$genotype))
print("Cluster 2 cell counts by genotype:")
print(table(cluster_2_all$genotype))

# Define mitochondrial gene list
mito_genes <- c("Park7", "Prdx5", "Ddit4", "Sirt3", 
                "Foxo3", "Nfe2l2", "Sesn2", "Uqcrc1", "Bhlhe40", "Hmox1", 
                "Nfkb1", "Mtor", "Tsc1", "Slc38a1", "Cat", "Prdx2", "Sod2", 
                "Psmb5", "Gstp1", "Hif1a", "Prdx1", "Uqcrc2", "Sod1",
                "Txnrd1", "Tsc2")

mito_genes <- c("Grm2", "Wif1", "Lgi2", "Rgs2", "Srxn1", "Osgin1", "Hcn1", "Aox1", "Hdac9", "Nap1l5", "Adcyap1", "Nr4a2", "Gucy1a2", "Vps13c", "Mirg", "Nyap2", "Pclo", "Lnpep", "Atm", "Proser1",
                        "B9d2", "Npas4", "Slitrk6", "Rcan2", "Omg", "Osbpl3", "Spock3", "Sidt1", "Ngef", "Egr1","Dcc", "Nfat5", "Ccdc82", "Unc80", "Arfgef3", "Fzd3", "Klf12",
                        "Fkbp2", "Hes5", "Olig1", "Uqcc3", "Prr7", "Lmo1", "Zfp771",
                        "Nnat", "Zfyve16", "Klhl11", "Ccdc124")
mito_genes <- c("Ranbp1", "Dgcr8", "Cdc45", "Trmt2a", "Comt", "Tango2", "Mrpl40",
                    "Slc25a1", "Zdhhc8", "Txnrd2", "Hira", "Prodh")

# Find which mitochondrial genes are present in the data
genes_to_plot <- mito_genes[mito_genes %in% rownames(cluster_0_all) & 
                            mito_genes %in% rownames(cluster_2_all)]

print(paste("Mitochondrial genes found:", length(genes_to_plot), "out of", length(mito_genes)))

# Manual approach to ensure we get all genotypes for both clusters
get_avg_by_genotype <- function(seurat_obj, genes, cluster_name) {
  # Get all available genotypes in this cluster
  available_genotypes <- unique(seurat_obj$genotype)
  print(paste("Available genotypes in", cluster_name, ":"))
  print(available_genotypes)
  
  results <- list()
  # Define the desired genotype order
  desired_genotypes <- c("WT", "LD", "LD_NAC", "WT_NAC")
  
  for(geno in desired_genotypes) {
    if(geno %in% available_genotypes) {
      # Subset to this genotype
      cells <- Cells(seurat_obj)[seurat_obj$genotype == geno]
      if(length(cells) > 0) {
        # Get expression data
        expr_data <- GetAssayData(seurat_obj, assay = "Xenium", slot = "data")[genes, cells, drop = FALSE]
        # Calculate average
        avg_expr <- rowMeans(as.matrix(expr_data))
        results[[paste0(cluster_name, "_", geno)]] <- avg_expr
      } else {
        # If genotype exists but no cells, fill with NA
        results[[paste0(cluster_name, "_", geno)]] <- rep(NA, length(genes))
      }
    } else {
      # If genotype doesn't exist in this cluster, fill with NA
      results[[paste0(cluster_name, "_", geno)]] <- rep(NA, length(genes))
    }
  }
  # Convert to matrix
  do.call(cbind, results)
}

# Calculate averages for both clusters
avg_expression_cluster0 <- get_avg_by_genotype(cluster_0_all, genes_to_plot, "Cluster_0")
avg_expression_cluster2 <- get_avg_by_genotype(cluster_2_all, genes_to_plot, "Cluster_2")

# Combine into one matrix with all 8 columns
combined_expression <- cbind(avg_expression_cluster0, avg_expression_cluster2)

print("Final combined matrix column names:")
print(colnames(combined_expression))

# Check for NA values and handle them
print("Number of NA values before imputation:")
print(sum(is.na(combined_expression)))

# Replace NA values with 0 (or you could use row means)
combined_expression[is.na(combined_expression)] <- 0

# Scale the matrix
mat_scaled <- t(scale(t(combined_expression)))
mat_scaled[is.na(mat_scaled)] <- 0

print("Matrix dimensions after scaling:")
print(dim(mat_scaled))

# Create annotation for the heatmap
cluster_annotation <- c(rep("Cluster 0", ncol(avg_expression_cluster0)), 
                       rep("Cluster 2", ncol(avg_expression_cluster2)))

genotype_annotation <- c(gsub("Cluster_0_", "", colnames(avg_expression_cluster0)),
                        gsub("Cluster_2_", "", colnames(avg_expression_cluster2)))

# Create color mappings
cluster_colors <- c("Cluster 0" = "#FF7F00", "Cluster 2" = "#33A02C")
genotype_colors <- c("WT" = "#A6CEE3", "LD" = "#FB9A99", 
                     "LD_NAC" = "#FDBF6F", "WT_NAC" = "#FFFF99")

# Create heatmap with all 8 columns
pdf("Heatmap_Cluster0_vs_Cluster2_all_genotypes_mitochondrial_genes.pdf", width = 12, height = 14)
col_fun <- colorRamp2(c(-2, 0, 2), c("navy", "white", "firebrick"))

hm <- Heatmap(
  mat_scaled,
  name = "Z-score",
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  col = col_fun,
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 9),
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
  heatmap_legend_param = list(title = "Expression (z)"),
  column_title = "Mitochondrial/Metabolism Genes:\nCluster 0 vs Cluster 2 (All Genotypes)",
  show_row_names = TRUE,
  column_names_side = "bottom",
  # Add column annotations to show cluster and genotype
  top_annotation = HeatmapAnnotation(
    Cluster = cluster_annotation,
    Genotype = genotype_annotation,
    col = list(
      Cluster = cluster_colors,
      Genotype = genotype_colors
    ),
    annotation_name_side = "left",
    annotation_legend_param = list(
      Cluster = list(title = "Cluster"),
      Genotype = list(title = "Genotype")
    )
  )
)

draw(hm)
dev.off()

# Also create a version with the original gene order preserved (no row clustering)
pdf("Heatmap_Cluster0_vs_Cluster2_all_genotypes_mitochondrial_genes_ordered.pdf", width = 12, height = 14)

# Use the original mitochondrial gene order
original_order <- mito_genes[mito_genes %in% genes_to_plot]
mat_scaled_ordered <- mat_scaled[original_order, ]

hm_ordered <- Heatmap(
  mat_scaled_ordered,
  name = "Z-score",
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  col = col_fun,
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 9),
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
  heatmap_legend_param = list(title = "Expression (z)"),
  column_title = "Mitochondrial/Metabolism Genes:\nCluster 0 vs Cluster 2 (All Genotypes)",
  show_row_names = TRUE,
  column_names_side = "bottom",
  # Add column annotations to show cluster and genotype
  top_annotation = HeatmapAnnotation(
    Cluster = cluster_annotation,
    Genotype = genotype_annotation,
    col = list(
      Cluster = cluster_colors,
      Genotype = genotype_colors
    ),
    annotation_name_side = "left",
    annotation_legend_param = list(
      Cluster = list(title = "Cluster"),
      Genotype = list(title = "Genotype")
    )
  )
)

draw(hm_ordered)
dev.off()

# Print summary statistics
print("=== SUMMARY ===")
print(paste("Total mitochondrial genes plotted:", length(genes_to_plot)))
print(paste("Total columns in heatmap:", ncol(combined_expression)))
print("Column order in heatmap:")
print(colnames(combined_expression))

# Calculate and print some basic statistics
cluster_0_means <- rowMeans(combined_expression[, 1:4], na.rm = TRUE)
cluster_2_means <- rowMeans(combined_expression[, 5:8], na.rm = TRUE)

print("Average expression by cluster (across all genotypes):")
comparison_df <- data.frame(
  Gene = genes_to_plot,
  Cluster_0_Mean = round(cluster_0_means, 3),
  Cluster_2_Mean = round(cluster_2_means, 3),
  Fold_Change = round(cluster_0_means / cluster_2_means, 3)
)
print(comparison_df)

# Find top differentially expressed genes between clusters
diff_expr <- cluster_0_means - cluster_2_means
top_higher_in_0 <- names(sort(diff_expr, decreasing = TRUE))[1:5]
top_higher_in_2 <- names(sort(diff_expr, decreasing = FALSE))[1:5]

print("Top 5 mitochondrial genes higher in Cluster 0:")
for (gene in top_higher_in_0) {
  print(paste(gene, ":", round(diff_expr[gene], 3)))
}

print("Top 5 mitochondrial genes higher in Cluster 2:")
for (gene in top_higher_in_2) {
  print(paste(gene, ":", round(diff_expr[gene], 3)))
}
```

```{r new plots/visualizations pf edgeR DE data}

library(ggVennDiagram)

venn_list <- list(
  "LD vs WT"     = rownames(tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster0[tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster0$FDR < 0.05, ]),
  "LD_NAC vs LD" = rownames(tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0[tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0$FDR < 0.05, ])
)

ggVennDiagram(venn_list) + 
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "steelblue")


library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

summary_counts <- data.frame(
  contrast = c("LD vs WT", "LD_NAC vs LD", "WT_NAC vs WT", "WT_NAC vs LD_NAC"),
  up   = c(sum(tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster0$logFC > 0 & tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster0$FDR < 0.05),
           sum(tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0$logFC > 0 & tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0$FDR < 0.05),
           sum(tab_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster0$logFC > 0 & tab_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster0$FDR < 0.05),
           sum(tab_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0$logFC > 0 & tab_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0$FDR < 0.05)),
  down = c(sum(tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster0$logFC < 0 & tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster0$FDR < 0.05),
           sum(tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0$logFC < 0 & tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0$FDR < 0.05),
           sum(tab_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster0$logFC < 0 & tab_WT_vs_WT_NAC_cluster0$FDR < 0.05),
           sum(tab_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0$logFC < 0 & tab_WT_NAC_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0$FDR < 0.05))
)

summary_counts_long <- summary_counts %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = c(up, down), names_to = "direction", values_to = "count")

ggplot(summary_counts_long, aes(x = contrast, y = count, fill = direction)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "DEG Summary by Contrast", y = "Number of Genes", x = "")


common_genes <- intersect(rownames(tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster0), rownames(tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster2))
df_corr <- data.frame(
  cluster0 = tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster0[common_genes, "logFC"],
  cluster2 = tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster2[common_genes, "logFC"]
)

ggplot(df_corr, aes(x = cluster0, y = cluster2)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "red") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Correlation of logFC between Clusters 0 and 2",
       x = "Cluster 0 logFC", y = "Cluster 2 logFC") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, lty = 2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, lty = 2)



top_genes <- tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster0 %>%
  filter(FDR < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(FDR) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10) %>%
  pull(gene)

plotSmear(res_WT_vs_LD_cluster0_edgeR, de.tags = top_genes)

library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Mm.eg.db)

# Example: use DE genes from one contrast
sig_genes <- rownames(tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0[tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0$FDR < 0.05, ])

ego <- enrichGO(
  gene          = sig_genes,
  OrgDb         = org.Mm.eg.db,
  keyType       = "SYMBOL",
  ont           = "BP",
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  qvalueCutoff  = 0.05
)

go_results <- as.data.frame(ego)

# Assuming you have a data frame `go_results` with columns: Term, p.adjust, GeneRatio
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(go_results, aes(x = GeneRatio, y = reorder(Term, GeneRatio))) +
  geom_point(aes(size = -log10(p.adjust)), alpha = 0.7) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Gene Ratio", y = "", title = "GO Enrichment") +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "-log10(FDR)")

```

```{R gsea pathway analysis}
# Load required packages for pathway analysis
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Mm.eg.db)  # Mouse database (replace with org.Hs.eg.db for human)
library(enrichplot)
library(DOSE)
library(fgsea)
library(msigdbr)
library(pathview)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(patchwork)

# 1. PREPARE GENE LISTS FOR PATHWAY ANALYSIS

# Function to prepare ranked gene list for GSEA
prepare_gsea_rankings <- function(edgeR_df, method = "logFC") {
  # Remove rows with NA values
  edgeR_df <- edgeR_df[!is.na(edgeR_df$logFC) & !is.na(edgeR_df$FDR), ]
  
  if (method == "logFC") {
    # Rank by logFC (for GSEA)
    rankings <- edgeR_df$logFC
    names(rankings) <- edgeR_df$gene
  } else if (method == "signed_pval") {
    # Rank by signed p-value (-log10(FDR) * sign(logFC))
    rankings <- -log10(edgeR_df$FDR) * sign(edgeR_df$logFC)
    names(rankings) <- edgeR_df$gene
  }
  
  # Sort in decreasing order
  rankings <- sort(rankings, decreasing = TRUE)
  return(rankings)
}

# Prepare ranked lists for each comparison
ranked_LD_vs_WT <- prepare_gsea_rankings(tab_WT_vs_LD_cluster0)
ranked_LDNAC_vs_WT <- prepare_gsea_rankings(tab_WT_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0)
ranked_LDNAC_vs_LD <- prepare_gsea_rankings(tab_LD_vs_LD_NAC_cluster0)

# 2. LOAD GENE SETS

# Get MSigDB gene sets (Hallmark, C2:CP, C5:GO)
hallmark_sets <- msigdbr(species = "Mus musculus", category = "H")
kegg_sets <- msigdbr(species = "Mus musculus", category = "C2", subcategory = "CP")
go_bp_sets <- msigdbr(species = "Mus musculus", category = "C5", subcategory = "BP")
go_mf_sets <- msigdbr(species = "Mus musculus", category = "C5", subcategory = "MF")
go_cc_sets <- msigdbr(species = "Mus musculus", category = "C5", subcategory = "CC")

# Convert to list format for fgsea
hallmark_list <- split(hallmark_sets$gene_symbol, hallmark_sets$gs_name)
kegg_list <- split(kegg_sets$gene_symbol, kegg_sets$gs_name)
go_bp_list <- split(go_bp_sets$gene_symbol, go_bp_sets$gs_name)
go_mf_list <- split(go_mf_sets$gene_symbol, go_mf_sets$gs_name)
go_cc_list <- split(go_cc_sets$gene_symbol, go_cc_sets$gs_name)

# 3. RUN GSEA WITH FGSEA

run_gsea_analysis <- function(ranked_list, gene_sets, gene_set_name, comparison_name) {
  set.seed(123)
  
  # Check if ranked list is valid
  if (length(ranked_list) == 0) {
```
