```{R gsea pathway analysis}
    warning(paste("Empty ranked list for", comparison_name, gene_set_name))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Check if gene sets are valid
  if (length(gene_sets) == 0) {
    warning(paste("Empty gene sets for", comparison_name, gene_set_name))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Run GSEA with error handling
  fgsea_res <- tryCatch({
    fgseaMultilevel(
      pathways = gene_sets,
      stats = ranked_list,
      minSize = 15,
      maxSize = 500,
      eps = 1e-50
    )
  }, error = function(e) {
    message(paste("GSEA failed for", comparison_name, gene_set_name, ":", e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })
  
  # Check if results are empty
  if (is.null(fgsea_res) || nrow(fgsea_res) == 0) {
    message(paste("No GSEA results for", comparison_name, gene_set_name))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Fix the nMoreExtreme column if it contains empty vectors
  if ("nMoreExtreme" %in% names(fgsea_res)) {
    fgsea_res$nMoreExtreme <- sapply(fgsea_res$nMoreExtreme, function(x) {
      if (length(x) == 0) {
        return(NA_real_)
      } else {
        return(as.numeric(x))
      }
    })
  }
  
  # Convert to regular data frame
  fgsea_res <- as.data.frame(fgsea_res)
  
  # Convert leadingEdge to character column
  fgsea_res$leadingEdge_genes <- sapply(fgsea_res$leadingEdge, function(x) {
    if(length(x) > 0) {
      paste(x, collapse = ";")
    } else {
      ""
    }
  })
  
  # Remove the original list column
  fgsea_res$leadingEdge <- NULL
  
  # Add comparison and gene set info
  fgsea_res$comparison <- comparison_name
  fgsea_res$gene_set <- gene_set_name
  
  # Order by NES and p-value
  fgsea_res <- fgsea_res[order(fgsea_res$padj, -abs(fgsea_res$NES)), ]
  
  return(fgsea_res)
}

# Run GSEA for all comparisons and gene sets
gsea_results <- list()

# LD vs WT
message("Running LD_vs_WT comparisons...")
gsea_results[["LD_vs_WT_hallmark"]] <- run_gsea_analysis(ranked_LD_vs_WT, hallmark_list, "Hallmark", "LD_vs_WT")
gsea_results[["LD_vs_WT_kegg"]] <- run_gsea_analysis(ranked_LD_vs_WT, kegg_list, "KEGG", "LD_vs_WT")
gsea_results[["LD_vs_WT_go_bp"]] <- run_gsea_analysis(ranked_LD_vs_WT, go_bp_list, "GO_BP", "LD_vs_WT")

# LD_NAC vs WT
message("Running LDNAC_vs_WT comparisons...")
gsea_results[["LDNAC_vs_WT_hallmark"]] <- run_gsea_analysis(ranked_LDNAC_vs_WT, hallmark_list, "Hallmark", "LDNAC_vs_WT")
gsea_results[["LDNAC_vs_WT_kegg"]] <- run_gsea_analysis(ranked_LDNAC_vs_WT, kegg_list, "KEGG", "LDNAC_vs_WT")
gsea_results[["LDNAC_vs_WT_go_bp"]] <- run_gsea_analysis(ranked_LDNAC_vs_WT, go_bp_list, "GO_BP", "LDNAC_vs_WT")

# LD_NAC vs LD
message("Running LDNAC_vs_LD comparisons...")
gsea_results[["LDNAC_vs_LD_hallmark"]] <- run_gsea_analysis(ranked_LDNAC_vs_LD, hallmark_list, "Hallmark", "LDNAC_vs_LD")
gsea_results[["LDNAC_vs_LD_kegg"]] <- run_gsea_analysis(ranked_LDNAC_vs_LD, kegg_list, "KEGG", "LDNAC_vs_LD")
gsea_results[["LDNAC_vs_LD_go_bp"]] <- run_gsea_analysis(ranked_LDNAC_vs_LD, go_bp_list, "GO_BP", "LDNAC_vs_LD")

# 4. COMBINE AND SAVE GSEA RESULTS

# Remove NULL results
gsea_results <- gsea_results[!sapply(gsea_results, is.null)]

# Check if we have any results
if(length(gsea_results) > 0) {
  
  # Combine all results
  all_gsea_results <- do.call(rbind, gsea_results)
  rownames(all_gsea_results) <- NULL
  
  # Ensure it's a proper data frame without list columns
  all_gsea_results <- as.data.frame(all_gsea_results)
  
  # Remove any remaining list columns
  list_columns <- sapply(all_gsea_results, is.list)
  if(any(list_columns)) {
    warning("Removing list columns: ", paste(names(all_gsea_results)[list_columns], collapse = ", "))
    all_gsea_results <- all_gsea_results[, !list_columns]
  }
  
  # Convert all columns to appropriate types
  all_gsea_results$pathway <- as.character(all_gsea_results$pathway)
  all_gsea_results$pval <- as.numeric(all_gsea_results$pval)
  all_gsea_results$padj <- as.numeric(all_gsea_results$padj)
  all_gsea_results$ES <- as.numeric(all_gsea_results$ES)
  all_gsea_results$NES <- as.numeric(all_gsea_results$NES)
  
  # Handle nMoreExtreme column carefully
  if("nMoreExtreme" %in% names(all_gsea_results)) {
    all_gsea_results$nMoreExtreme <- sapply(all_gsea_results$nMoreExtreme, function(x) {
      if(length(x) == 0 || is.null(x)) {
        return(NA_real_)
      } else {
        return(as.numeric(x))
      }
    })
  }
  
  all_gsea_results$size <- as.numeric(all_gsea_results$size)
  
  if("leadingEdge_genes" %in% names(all_gsea_results)) {
    all_gsea_results$leadingEdge_genes <- as.character(all_gsea_results$leadingEdge_genes)
  }
  
  all_gsea_results$comparison <- as.character(all_gsea_results$comparison)
  all_gsea_results$gene_set <- as.character(all_gsea_results$gene_set)
  
  # Save comprehensive results
  write.csv(all_gsea_results, "Cluster0_EdgeR_GSEA_All_Results.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  
  # Filter significant results (FDR < 0.25 for GSEA)
  significant_gsea <- all_gsea_results[all_gsea_results$padj < 0.25 & !is.na(all_gsea_results$padj), ]
  write.csv(significant_gsea, "Cluster0_EdgeR_GSEA_Significant.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  
  print("GSEA completed successfully!")
  print(paste("Total pathways tested:", nrow(all_gsea_results)))
  print(paste("Significant pathways (FDR < 0.25):", nrow(significant_gsea)))
  
  # Print top pathways by comparison
  for(comp in unique(all_gsea_results$comparison)) {
    comp_results <- all_gsea_results[all_gsea_results$comparison == comp & all_gsea_results$padj < 0.25 & !is.na(all_gsea_results$padj), ]
    if(nrow(comp_results) > 0) {
      print(paste("Top pathways for", comp, ":"))
      top_pathways <- head(comp_results[order(comp_results$padj), c("pathway", "NES", "padj")], 5)
      print(top_pathways)
    }
  }
  
  # 5. CREATE VISUALIZATIONS
  
  # Enhanced visualization function
  create_gsea_visualizations <- function(all_results, sig_results) {
    
    # Convert to data frame to ensure proper handling
    all_results <- as.data.frame(all_results)
    sig_results <- as.data.frame(sig_results)
    
    # Remove any list columns from visualization data
    list_cols_all <- sapply(all_results, is.list)
    if(any(list_cols_all)) {
      all_results <- all_results[, !list_cols_all]
    }
    
    list_cols_sig <- sapply(sig_results, is.list)
    if(any(list_cols_sig)) {
      sig_results <- sig_results[, !list_cols_sig]
    }
    
    # 1. Dot plot of top pathways across comparisons
    create_dot_plot <- function(sig_data, n_pathways = 15) {
      # Ensure we have the required columns and data
      if(nrow(sig_data) == 0) {
        message("No significant data for dot plot")
        return(ggplot() + theme_void() + labs(title = "No significant pathways for dot plot"))
      }
      
      required_cols <- c("pathway", "comparison", "padj", "NES")
      missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(sig_data))
      if(length(missing_cols) > 0) {
        message("Missing required columns for dot plot: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
        return(ggplot() + theme_void() + labs(title = "Missing columns for dot plot"))
      }
      
      # Get the top pathways by absolute NES across all comparisons
      top_pathways <- sig_data %>%
        group_by(pathway) %>%
        summarise(max_abs_NES = max(abs(NES))) %>%
        arrange(desc(max_abs_NES)) %>%
        head(n_pathways) %>%
        pull(pathway)
      
      plot_data <- sig_data[sig_data$pathway %in% top_pathways, ]
      
      ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = comparison, y = pathway)) +
        geom_point(aes(size = -log10(padj), color = NES)) +
        scale_color_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", 
                             midpoint = 0, name = "NES") +
        scale_size_continuous(name = "-Log10(FDR)", range = c(2, 8)) +
        labs(title = "Top Enriched Pathways Across Comparisons",
             subtitle = "Bubble size: -log10(FDR), Color: NES",
             x = "Comparison", y = "Pathway") +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
              axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8))
    }
    
    # 2. NES comparison bar plot
    create_nes_barplot <- function(sig_data, top_n = 10) {
      # Ensure we have the required columns and data
      if(nrow(sig_data) == 0) {
        message("No significant data for bar plot")
        return(ggplot() + theme_void() + labs(title = "No significant pathways for bar plot"))
      }
      
      required_cols <- c("pathway", "comparison", "NES")
      missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(sig_data))
      if(length(missing_cols) > 0) {
        message("Missing required columns for bar plot: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
        return(ggplot() + theme_void() + labs(title = "Missing columns for bar plot"))
      }
      
      # Get top pathways for each comparison
      top_by_comparison <- sig_data %>%
        group_by(comparison) %>%
        slice_max(order_by = abs(NES), n = top_n) %>%
        ungroup()
      
      ggplot(top_by_comparison, aes(x = NES, y = reorder(pathway, NES), fill = NES)) +
        geom_col() +
        scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", 
                            midpoint = 0, name = "NES") +
        labs(title = "Top Pathways by Normalized Enrichment Score",
             x = "NES", y = "") +
        facet_wrap(~comparison, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7))
    }
    
    # Create all visualizations
    pdf("Cluster0_GSEA_Comprehensive_Visualizations.pdf", width = 12, height = 10)
    
    if(nrow(sig_results) > 0) {
      tryCatch({
        # Dot plot
        p1 <- create_dot_plot(sig_results)
        print(p1)
      }, error = function(e) {
        message("Error creating dot plot: ", e$message)
        p_message <- ggplot() + 
          annotate("text", x = 1, y = 1, label = paste("Error in dot plot:", e$message), size = 4) +
          theme_void()
        print(p_message)
      })
      
      tryCatch({
        # NES bar plot
        p2 <- create_nes_barplot(sig_results, 8)
        print(p2)
      }, error = function(e) {
        message("Error creating bar plot: ", e$message)
        p_message <- ggplot() + 
          annotate("text", x = 1, y = 1, label = paste("Error in bar plot:", e$message), size = 4) +
          theme_void()
        print(p_message)
      })
      
    } else {
      # If no significant results, create a message plot
      p_message <- ggplot() + 
        annotate("text", x = 1, y = 1, label = "No significant pathways found (FDR < 0.25)", size = 6) +
        theme_void()
      print(p_message)
    }
    
    dev.off()
    
    # Create individual comparison plots
    pdf("Cluster0_GSEA_By_Comparison.pdf", width = 10, height = 8)
    
    for(comp in unique(all_results$comparison)) {
      comp_data <- all_results[all_results$comparison == comp, ]
      comp_sig <- comp_data[comp_data$padj < 0.25 & !is.na(comp_data$padj), ]
      
      if(nrow(comp_sig) > 0) {
        tryCatch({
          # Create dot plot for this comparison
          p_comp <- ggplot(comp_sig, aes(x = NES, y = reorder(pathway, NES))) +
            geom_point(aes(size = -log10(padj), color = NES)) +
            scale_color_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", 
                                 midpoint = 0, name = "NES") +
            scale_size_continuous(name = "-Log10(FDR)", range = c(2, 6)) +
            labs(title = paste("GSEA Results:", comp),
                 x = "Normalized Enrichment Score (NES)",
                 y = "") +
            theme_minimal() +
            theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8))
          
          print(p_comp)
        }, error = function(e) {
          message("Error creating plot for ", comp, ": ", e$message)
        })
      }
    }
    
    dev.off()
    
    print("✅ GSEA visualizations created and saved!")
  }
  
  # Create a summary report
  create_gsea_summary_report <- function(sig_results) {
    # Convert to data frame and remove list columns
    sig_results <- as.data.frame(sig_results)
    list_cols <- sapply(sig_results, is.list)
    if(any(list_cols)) {
      sig_results <- sig_results[, !list_cols]
    }
    
    if(nrow(sig_results) == 0) {
      report_text <- "No significant pathways found at FDR < 0.25"
      writeLines(report_text, "GSEA_Summary_Report.txt")
      return(report_text)
    }
    
    summary_text <- paste(
      "GSEA SUMMARY REPORT",
      "===================",
      paste("Total significant pathways:", nrow(sig_results)),
      "",
      "Breakdown by comparison:",
      sep = "\n"
    )
    
    for(comp in unique(sig_results$comparison)) {
      comp_count <- sum(sig_results$comparison == comp)
      up_count <- sum(sig_results$comparison == comp & sig_results$NES > 0)
      down_count <- sum(sig_results$comparison == comp & sig_results$NES < 0)
      
      summary_text <- paste(
        summary_text,
        paste(comp, ":", comp_count, "pathways (", up_count, "up,", down_count, "down)"),
        sep = "\n"
      )
    }
    
    # Top pathways overall
    top_overall <- sig_results %>%
      arrange(padj) %>%
      head(10)
    
    pathway_summaries <- sapply(1:nrow(top_overall), function(i) {
      paste(top_overall$pathway[i], " (NES=", round(top_overall$NES[i], 2), ", FDR=", 
            formatC(top_overall$padj[i], format = "e", digits = 2), ")", sep = "")
    })
    
    summary_text <- paste(
      summary_text,
      "",
      "Top 10 most significant pathways:",
      paste(pathway_summaries, collapse = "\n"),
      sep = "\n"
    )
    
    # Write to file
    writeLines(summary_text, "GSEA_Summary_Report.txt")
    
    return(summary_text)
  }
  
  # Now run the visualizations and summary report
  create_gsea_visualizations(all_gsea_results, significant_gsea)
  
  # Generate summary report
  report <- create_gsea_summary_report(significant_gsea)
  print(report)
  
} else {
  print("No GSEA results were generated. Please check the input data and pathway databases.")
}

print("🎉 GSEA analysis complete! Check the generated files:")
print("- Cluster0_EdgeR_GSEA_All_Results.csv (all pathways)")
print("- Cluster0_EdgeR_GSEA_Significant.csv (significant pathways only)")
print("- Cluster0_GSEA_Comprehensive_Visualizations.pdf (all plots)")
print("- Cluster0_GSEA_By_Comparison.pdf (individual comparison plots)")
print("- GSEA_Summary_Report.txt (text summary)")
```

```{r}


# Get average expression for ALL genes by animal_id in Cluster 0
avg_expression_cluster0_by_animal <- AverageExpression(
  cluster_0_all,
  assays = "Xenium",
  slot = "data",
  group.by = "animal_id"
)[[1]]

# Get average expression for ALL genes by animal_id in Cluster 2
avg_expression_cluster2_by_animal <- AverageExpression(
  cluster_2_all,
  assays = "Xenium",
  slot = "data",
  group.by = "animal_id"
)[[1]]

# Check the structure of the results
print("Cluster 0 average expression matrix dimensions (by animal):")
print(dim(avg_expression_cluster0_by_animal))
print("Cluster 0 column names (animal IDs):")
print(colnames(avg_expression_cluster0_by_animal))

print("Cluster 2 average expression matrix dimensions (by animal):")
print(dim(avg_expression_cluster2_by_animal))
print("Cluster 2 column names (animal IDs):")
print(colnames(avg_expression_cluster2_by_animal))

# Convert to data frames and add gene names
cluster0_by_animal_df <- as.data.frame(avg_expression_cluster0_by_animal)
cluster0_by_animal_df$Gene <- rownames(cluster0_by_animal_df)

cluster2_by_animal_df <- as.data.frame(avg_expression_cluster2_by_animal)
cluster2_by_animal_df$Gene <- rownames(cluster2_by_animal_df)

# Reorder columns to put Gene first
cluster0_by_animal_df <- cluster0_by_animal_df[, c("Gene", setdiff(colnames(cluster0_by_animal_df), "Gene"))]
cluster2_by_animal_df <- cluster2_by_animal_df[, c("Gene", setdiff(colnames(cluster2_by_animal_df), "Gene"))]

# Save as CSV files
write.csv(cluster0_by_animal_df, "Cluster_0_all_genes_average_expression_by_animal.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(cluster2_by_animal_df, "Cluster_2_all_genes_average_expression_by_animal.csv", row.names = FALSE)

print("Average expression by animal files saved:")
print(paste("Cluster 0:", nrow(cluster0_by_animal_df), "genes with", ncol(cluster0_by_animal_df)-1, "animal columns"))
print(paste("Cluster 2:", nrow(cluster2_by_animal_df), "genes with", ncol(cluster2_by_animal_df)-1, "animal columns"))

# Optional: Add genotype information to animal data
# First, let's get the mapping between animal_id and genotype
if ("animal_id" %in% colnames(cluster_0_all@meta.data) & "genotype" %in% colnames(cluster_0_all@meta.data)) {
  # Get unique animal_id to genotype mapping
  animal_genotype_map <- unique(cluster_0_all@meta.data[, c("animal_id", "genotype")])
  print("Animal ID to genotype mapping:")
  print(animal_genotype_map)
  
  # Add genotype information to column names for better interpretation
  colnames(cluster0_by_animal_df) <- c("Gene", 
                                       paste0(colnames(avg_expression_cluster0_by_animal), 
                                              "_", 
                                              animal_genotype_map$genotype[match(colnames(avg_expression_cluster0_by_animal), 
                                                                                animal_genotype_map$animal_id)]))
  
  # Do the same for cluster 2 if the mapping exists
  if ("animal_id" %in% colnames(cluster_2_all@meta.data) & "genotype" %in% colnames(cluster_2_all@meta.data)) {
    animal_genotype_map_2 <- unique(cluster_2_all@meta.data[, c("animal_id", "genotype")])
    colnames(cluster2_by_animal_df) <- c("Gene", 
                                         paste0(colnames(avg_expression_cluster2_by_animal), 
                                                "_", 
                                                animal_genotype_map_2$genotype[match(colnames(avg_expression_cluster2_by_animal), 
                                                                                    animal_genotype_map_2$animal_id)]))
  }
  
  # Save the annotated versions
  write.csv(cluster0_by_animal_df, "Cluster_0_all_genes_average_expression_by_animal_with_genotype.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  write.csv(cluster2_by_animal_df, "Cluster_2_all_genes_average_expression_by_animal_with_genotype.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  print("Annotated files with genotype information saved")
}

# Create a combined file with both clusters for easy comparison
combined_by_animal <- data.frame(Gene = cluster0_by_animal_df$Gene)

# Add Cluster 0 data with prefix
animal_cols_0 <- setdiff(colnames(cluster0_by_animal_df), "Gene")
for(animal_col in animal_cols_0) {
  combined_by_animal[[paste0("Cluster_0_", animal_col)]] <- cluster0_by_animal_df[[animal_col]]
}

# Add Cluster 2 data with prefix
animal_cols_2 <- setdiff(colnames(cluster2_by_animal_df), "Gene")
for(animal_col in animal_cols_2) {
  combined_by_animal[[paste0("Cluster_2_", animal_col)]] <- cluster2_by_animal_df[[animal_col]]
}

# Save combined file
write.csv(combined_by_animal, "Combined_Cluster_0_2_all_genes_by_animal.csv", row.names = FALSE)

print("Combined file saved with all animal replicate data from both clusters")

# Print summary of top expressed genes by cluster and animal
print("=== TOP EXPRESSED GENES SUMMARY (BY ANIMAL) ===")

# Function to get top genes for a specific animal
get_top_genes_animal <- function(expression_df, animal_col, n = 5) {
  temp_df <- data.frame(
    Gene = expression_df$Gene,
    Expression = expression_df[[animal_col]]
  )
  temp_df[order(-temp_df$Expression), ][1:n, ]
}

# Print top genes for each animal in Cluster 0
for(animal_col in animal_cols_0) {
  top_genes <- get_top_genes_animal(cluster0_by_animal_df, animal_col, 3)
  print(paste("Top 3 genes in Cluster 0", animal_col, ":"))
  print(top_genes)
}

# Print top genes for each animal in Cluster 2
for(animal_col in animal_cols_2) {
  top_genes <- get_top_genes_animal(cluster2_by_animal_df, animal_col, 3)
  print(paste("Top 3 genes in Cluster 2", animal_col, ":"))
  print(top_genes)
}

# Additional: Calculate coefficient of variation (CV) for each gene across animals
# This shows how variable each gene is across replicates
calculate_cv <- function(expression_df) {
  # Get only the numeric columns (exclude Gene column)
  numeric_cols <- expression_df[, -which(colnames(expression_df) == "Gene")]
  # Calculate CV = standard deviation / mean
  cv <- apply(numeric_cols, 1, function(x) sd(x) / mean(x))
  return(cv)
}

cluster0_cv <- calculate_cv(cluster0_by_animal_df)
cluster2_cv <- calculate_cv(cluster2_by_animal_df)

# Add CV to the data frames
cluster0_by_animal_df$CV <- cluster0_cv
cluster2_by_animal_df$CV <- cluster2_cv

# Save with CV
write.csv(cluster0_by_animal_df, "Cluster_0_all_genes_average_expression_by_animal_with_CV.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(cluster2_by_animal_df, "Cluster_2_all_genes_average_expression_by_animal_with_CV.csv", row.names = FALSE)

print("Files with coefficient of variation (CV) saved")
print("Top 5 most variable genes in Cluster 0 (highest CV):")
print(cluster0_by_animal_df[order(-cluster0_by_animal_df$CV), c("Gene", "CV")][1:5, ])
print("Top 5 most variable genes in Cluster 2 (highest CV):")
print(cluster2_by_animal_df[order(-cluster2_by_animal_df$CV), c("Gene", "CV")][1:5, ])





```
